programme.title: Energy market fallout from US-Israel strikes on Iran
programme.desc: Oil markets brace for a shock as the joint US-Israeli strikes against Iran risks disrupting the global supply of crude oil. CGTN host Lincoln Humphries talks to experts to analyze the conflict's impact on global oil supply, the repercussions of the Strait of Hormuz closure and the broader implications on international energy prices, global supply chains, and the world economy.

programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already "living in the future"!

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: The real impact of global warming is now being felt in communities around the world. Climate scientists explain what to expect where you live.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: Hundreds of millions of people around the world could run out of water soon. Experts are desperately searching for solutions to stave off "Day Zero" when the taps will run dry. But the recent discovery of a massive aquifer hidden beneath the U.S. coastline may offer the greatest hope for humanity.

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.desc: More than 60,000 fires scorched the Amazon in 2019 causing enormous damage to an ecosystem that’s vital to human existence. What caused the devastating blazes, how will they impact the climate crisis and will the Amazon ever be able to recover?

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Rebirth of an Underwater Forest
programme.desc: Kelp forests harbor a greater variety and higher diversity of plants and animals than almost any other ocean community. Many organisms use the thick blades as a safe shelter for their young from predators or even rough storms. But, what can be done when this ecosystem is out of balance?

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.desc: The SUrge-STructure-Atmosphere INteraction facility, or SUSTAIN, will help scientists at the Rosenstiel School of Marine and Atmospheric Science better understand the complex interactions between a hurricane and the ocean below it, as well as the coastlines it may affect.

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.desc: From wildflower blooms in the desert to large colonies of jellyfish off of Monterey and unbelievable glow in the dark waves, this is California at its finest. Life can bloom in the most unexpected of ways.

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 Antarctica Science Below Zero
programme.desc: Antarctica is a mysterious and unexplored continent. Thanks to the Chilean Antarctic Institute and the research center Dynamics of Marine Ecosystems of High Latitudes, a group of scientists are suffering the extreme temperatures to study climate change and the earth's ocean currents.

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.desc: Tokyo is the most populated urban zone on the planet. Built on a fault line, threatened by flooding and several active volcanoes, the city seems doomed to disappear.

programme.title: Climate Impact Asia
programme.desc: By 2100 over 1 billion people on Earth will live in low-lying coastal zones. 70% of these will live in Southeast Asia, a highly vulnerable region to climate change.

programme.title: Climate Impact Asia
programme.desc: Natural hazards remain a constant challenge for over 400 million people who live in low lying communities built along major mega delta regions in coastal zones.

programme.title: Climate Impact Asia
programme.desc: Many people now know that climate change is real, that they see the data or they see the observations for themselves. What's needed now is a sense of urgency.

programme.title: Climate Impact Asia
programme.desc: Rice, it's a staple food for many in Asia. It provides 1/3 of the energy in the average Asian diet and is the income source for more than 500 million people.

programme.title: The Health Of Our Oceans
programme.desc: Renowned marine biologist Dr. Sylvia Earle reveals why the dual threats of ocean pollution and overfishing could have a devastating impact on mankind.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.sub-title: S01 : E58 The West is Burning
programme.desc: Learn how the history of forest management and loss of public trust, coupled with climate change, have led to the conditions driving mega-fire nearly year-round.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: A team of scientists embarks on a quest to explore the mesopelagic zone or ocean twilight zone which sits beneath the surface layer of the ocean.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: After record-setting conflagrations erupted in the region’s prized forests, new tools using cutting edge technology are being developed to help save property and lives.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: As scientific studies confirm sea level changes throughout the globe, major coastal cities like Miami are now fighting back against these rising tides.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: The Greenland ice sheet, the last remnant of the Ice Age, is melting at an unprecedented rate. Today, scientists and researchers from all over the world are paying close attention to what could become a global catastrophe.

programme.title: What's My Car Worth?
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 The Sports Car Craze
programme.desc: Collector car experts Bill Stephens and Keith Martin visit the annual Petersen Automotive Museum Garage Sale and Swap Meet to examine classic European sports cars.

programme.title: What's My Car Worth?
programme.desc: Bill Stephens and Keith Martin take a ride on the wild side when they appraise American big block beasts, including a barn find Boss 429, a Shelby GT500, and a Sting Ray.

programme.title: What's My Car Worth?
programme.desc: Bill Stephens and Keith Martin appraise muscle cars including a Plymouth Superbird and a Mustang Mach 1 at the Petersen Automotive Museum Garage Sale and Swap Meet in LA.

programme.title: What's My Car Worth?
programme.desc: Collector car expert Bill Stephens and Keith Martin appraise some of the most iconic sports cars of all time, such as a Ferrari 365 GTB/4 Daytona and a 1965 Shelby GT350.

programme.title: What's My Car Worth?
programme.desc: Bill Stephens and Keith Martin evaluate real classics in Scottsdale, Arizona, including a Rolls-Royce Phantom II with a Merlin airplane engine.

programme.title: What's My Car Worth?
programme.desc: Bill Stephens and Keith Martin appraise fascinating American and European collectibles including a rare and luxurious Facel Vega FV-1 and a classic '51 Ford F1 Pickup.

programme.title: What's My Car Worth?
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 The BMW Micro Car
programme.desc: On Amelia Island, Bill Stephens and Keith Martin look under the hood to put a price on some of the finest vintage cars, including a Bel Air and Ferrari.

programme.title: What's My Car Worth?
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 American Classics - The Golden Age
programme.desc: Bill Stephens and Keith Martin evaluate elegant vintage automobiles including a 1932 Duesenberg from one of the country's foremost private collections.

programme.title: What's My Car Worth?
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Two Decades of Horsepower
programme.desc: Bill Stephens and Keith Martin visit one of the most prestigious car shows in America and put a price on some of the most iconic cars of their time, including a Ferrari.

programme.title: What's My Car Worth?
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 The Aga Khan's Car
programme.desc: Bill Stephens and Keith Martin visit the Amelia Island Concours d'Elegance to appraise cars, including a rare '65 Ferrari 500 Superfast once owned by royalty.

programme.title: What's My Car Worth?
programme.desc: Bill Stephens and Keith Martin visit a prestigious car show and appraise vintage sports cars, including a classic Corvette and a '59 Mercedes-Benz 300SL.

programme.title: What's My Car Worth?
programme.desc: Bill Stephens and Keith Martin examine magnificent cars worth millions at the Gooding and Co. auction including a Best in Show winner from Pebble Beach.

programme.title: Pixel Collage
programme.desc: A well-crafted collage of selected short documentaries telling stories about all aspects of China! People, technology, culture, and wildlife, all are showcased in Internet-friendly form.

programme.title: Today’s Top Pick
programme.desc: Documentaries in this slot are rebroadcasts of our most-viewed and most popular stories of the season. They feature important social, economic, environmental or other policy-driven issues, affecting lives nationwide or simply in one small village. A broad selection of top productions by Chinese top documentary producers.

programme.title: Humanities and Geography
programme.desc: A strand devoted to the nature and wildlife of China, the people who lived alongside them, and the great and diverse landscapes with which they all contend.

programme.title: Living China
programme.desc: Real life stories told from the personal perspective. Moving, dramatic, sorrows and joys, expressed emphatically and expressed quietly. Watch closely to see and understand the real China as it is lived.

programme.title: Special Edition
programme.desc: Prestige Chinese documentary production, tackling serious subjects with the best cinematography, editing, and all round production values with a unique Chinese perspective.

programme.title: Journeys and Discoveries
programme.desc: A documentary series showcasing the history of China and its people.

programme.title: History in the Frame
programme.desc: A documentary series featuring historical and archaeological exploration.

programme.title: Best Eats
programme.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering!

programme.title: Youthful China
programme.desc: The youth of a country is the future of that country. A series of documentaries focusing on the younger generation of China in which you get to see what they are achieving and what makes them tick!

programme.desc: Is it possible to prevent the tragedies caused by bridge collapses that rain steel and concrete on drivers?

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: Is it possible to protect ourselves from the catastrophic destructive power of earthquakes?

programme.desc: Top space resource companies all vie for competitive advantage. The new space race is just getting started.

programme.desc: Scientists are studying the benefits of a hybrid moon mission, one where humans and robots work in tandem.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: Climate change is causing increasing havoc to our environment. How can science respond to this challenge?

programme.desc: Venus may be considered Earth's evil twin. Hostile and unforgiving, Venus is the subject of intense scrutiny.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier

programme.title: Evolution of Ideas
programme.desc: Everything we can know about our lives and the universe is a subjective experience,either formed by one's own perceptions or the reports of others. Dr. Bernardo Kastrupexplains how we commonly associate this understanding about the universe assomething separate of our consciousness, however he strongly believes otherwise;Kastrup believes the evolution of ideas we perceive about the universe are actuallyoriginating within us.

Narratives heavilyinfluenced by civilizations and cultures beyond Rome, continue to influence the moral compassof life today, Verdesi realizes he...

programme.title: Across the Ice
programme.desc: After 45+ expeditions throughout over 150+ countries, one of the world's leadingadventurers and visionaries of conservation, Swedish explorer Johan Ernst Nilsondawns upon his biggest adventure yet. Follow his journey across the planet from theNorth Pole to the South Pole in Pole2Pole. The 525 day mostly carbon-neutral trekcovers 20,000 miles by means of skis, dogsled, boat, bike and kite. Pole2Pole is notonly one of the most difficult adventures he�s ever attempted, but also one of his mostphilanthropic adventures. Johan visits charities along the way to share their stories andraise global awareness.

programme.title: Chasing Bliss
programme.desc: Water is life, and the great conductor that connects us all. The oceans cover over 70%of our planet and hold almost 97% of the earth's water. True bliss in constant movementgiving life around the globe. This is a story of an eclectic mix of people across Hawaii,Ecuador and the USA, who draw energy from this life force and channel it positively intotheir everyday lives. Join Paulino in understanding what drives Surfer Laid Hamilton, orfilmmaker Robert Greaves, Big-Wave World Champion Paige Alms and WindsurfingWorld Record Holder Sarah Hauser. Coffee Farmer Anti Clancy, Dr Greg Mitchell,Research Scientist & Algae Visionary at Scripps.

programme.title: Particle Physics
programme.desc: At only 21, Frank Wilczek, a graduate student at Princeton University, defined theproperties of color gluons, which hold atomic nuclei together while working with DavidGross. He is known, among other things, for the discovery of asymptotic freedom, thedevelopment of quantum chromodynamics, the invention of axions, and the discoveryand exploitation of new forms of quantum statistics (anyons).

programme.title: Consciousness of Culture
programme.desc: Bruce Parry highlights the moments of his life that formed his career and life passion tochampion indigenous cultures around the world through exploration and film. Bruce isinterested in altered states of mind, and the creation of myths, why do we think what wethink? And what life phenomena and environments sculpt these ideas?

programme.title: The Nature of All Things
programme.desc: What is it that makes things what they are? Where does it come from? For ProfessorSeyyed Hossein Nasr, the quest for knowledge, specifically knowledge which enablesman to understand the true nature of things and which furthermore, �liberates anddelivers him from the fetters and limitations of earthly existence,� has been (andcontinues to be) the central concern and determinant of how we understand and live ourlives.

programme.title: Astrology Zone
programme.desc: Susan Miller is the founder and astrologist for AstrologyZone.com. The trusted,twenty-year-old platform provides the latest in intelligent astrological trends. Thisdiscussion with Deepak Chopra breaks down many popular misconceptions aboutastrological predictions, the various disciplines of study, ego, and consciousness inrelation to astrology. Miller also outlines the golden rule to understanding and getting themost out of astrological predications: astrology shows the condition, but not theoutcome�that outcome is completely up to you. �I can give you questions to ask to helpyou decide, but in the end, you write the script of your life.�

programme.title: Modern Metaphysical Idealism
programme.desc: Dr. Bernardo Kastrup, philosopher and author has been leading the modernrenaissance of metaphysical idealism. His theoretical reflections on the mind explainconsciousness as the only element of life that allows us to understand reality, andeverything we know about reality is subject to our experiences. This idea is often refutedby the thought that the brain is the source, not images and experiences provided byconsciousness.

programme.title: Nature, Space and Matter
programme.desc: Our understanding of the nature of time, space and matter have changed�even whatwe mean by these terms�in just the last few decades. Our interpretations continue tochange and more theories form as we learn and study these topics. Dr. Fred Alan Wolfexplains the origins of many of these foundational theories that have formed at differenttimes and why they came about. Before quantum physics, people knew that humanbeings were conscious. We knew that animals were conscious. But now, with newrevelations in quantum physics we begin to see a new role for consciousness.

programme.title: Creation Is Constant
programme.desc: Duane Elgin wants to show that the universe is a living field of existence, and that weare always in communion with a field of aliveness whether we are conscious of it or not.Throughout this lecture, Elgin explains his belief that in a living system, each part isintegral to the whole, so each entity is intimately connected to the entire universe. Tohim, creation is not something that happened with the Big Bang. Instead, creation isconsistently forming around us from a deeper abyss. The universe�s existence isbrought moment by moment through this continuous, moving process.

programme.title: Consciousness & Healing
programme.desc: Dr. Shamini Jain conducts clinical research in the areas of psychoneuroimmunology andintegrative medicine, receiving several awards from scientific organizations for her work.She�s been continuously interested in the process of healing and strived to uncovermany of the doubts she had in undergraduate school when she discovered the fieldpsychoneuroimmunology; the integrated relationship between mind, brain and body.

programme.title: Borderline Consciousness
programme.desc: Berit Brogaard was the first researcher to show that consciousness comes in degreesand that there can be borderline cases of consciousness. Her areas of research includeperception, consciousness, emotions, philosophical psychology, semantics andphilosophical logic. She also researches synesthesia, savant syndrome, blind sight, andperceptual reports.

programme.title: Mission Blue: Harbouring Hope
programme.desc: The oceans are the source of life on Earth, yet despite their vastness they are in trouble. Mission Blue, a Perpetual Planet Initiative partner, ignites change through a global network of “Hope Spots”, marine-protected areas of critical vulnerability.

programme.title: The Knobe Effect
programme.desc: We have experiences, creativity, understanding, thoughts, feelings and desires but dowe know how these occurrences happen? Joshua Knobe�s research has beenconcerned with the impact of people's moral judgments on their intuitions about thisquestion. He believes strongly that people's intuitions about whether a particular entity isconscious, essentially depends on whether the entity has the right sort of body.Therefore, he believes embodiment shapes our view of what is reality.

programme.title: Quantifying Beauty
programme.desc: How do we scientifically quantify beauty in people and in nature? How does the worldembody beautiful ideas? Dr. Frank Wilczek�s conversation with Deepak Chopradiscusses his book, �A Beautiful Question� which tests the common misconceptionsabout how we form our opinions on success, beauty and our imaginations.

programme.title: Connections Between Science & Philosophy
programme.desc: Dr. Menas Kafatos is internationally known for bridging the disciplines, writing andlecturing extensively on the convergence between science and philosophy, as there isan inherent need for a dialogue between science, spirituality, and religion. His book, Creating Cosmos with Deepak Chopra discusses the melding of topics like inflation,environmental issues, natural hazards, quantum theory and consciousness.

programme.title: Iranian Space Pioneer
programme.desc: Iranian electrical engineer, entrepreneur and former astronaut, Anousheh Ansari wasthe first female private space explorer to fly to the International Space Station. Sheexplains the challenging journey and the determination needed to reach space afterimmigrating to the U.S. from Iran. She also became the first person to publish a blogfrom space. The content invited readers to share her experience with the world. Shedescribed the Russian Soyuz capsule during liftoff, talked about the sights and smells ofthe space station, and explained the intricacies of everyday activities.

programme.title: Philosopher of the Mind
programme.desc: Dr. Paavo Pylkk�nen�s eclectic approach combines new physics-based insights withthose of analytical philosophy, phenomenology, cognitive science and neuroscience. Heproposes a view in which the mechanistic framework of classical physics andneuroscience is complemented by a more holistic approach. Pylkk�nen is particularlyknown for his work on mind-body-studies, building on David Bohm's interpretation ofquantum mechanics.

programme.title: Evolution of Ideas
programme.desc: Everything we can know about our lives and the universe is a subjective experience,either formed by one's own perceptions or the reports of others. programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: On July 13, 2011, two boaters retrieved a suitcase that was floating in the bay of Lorient. Inside, they discovered the tied up corpse of a man.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: Bloody Christmas next to the Leman lake (CASE OF RUTH LÉGERET) - On January 4, 2006, Ruth Légeret was found dead in the middle of a pool of blood at her luxurious property in Vevey, Switzerland. Next to her was the lifeless body of her friend, Marina Studer. Who could have killed these two simple and wealthy widows? Clue after clue, the Swiss police's investigation would revolve around an environment of family jealousy and financial greed.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: September 16 2005. The lifeless body of Audrey Jouannet, 24, is found hidden under the bed in her small apartment in Soisy-sur-Seine. It soon becomes apparent that the young woman has been tortured at length before being strangled. But surprisingly, though the highly meticulous murderer has taken care to leave no sign of his passage, the autopsy reveals traces of sperm on the victim. It will take all of the investigators' intuition to pierce the mystery of this heinous crime...

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: Sylvain Dromard finds the body of his wife Laurence lying in a pool of blood in the kitchen. The crime was particularly violent and the theory of a burglary that went wrong is soon excluded. But investigators don't understand who could want the adorable hairdresser of Saint-Martin-d'Ablois dead. During the investigation, the work of profilers will enable them to draw a very precise portrait of the murderer...

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: After an ordinary dinner, Pierre and Gabrielle Labrell suffer severe abdominal pains.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: Nelly Crémel, 39, leaves her home to go jogging... never to return. Eight days later, after a vast search campaign, her body is found. There's no doubt that it's murder. The case soon ignites public opinion, even inflaming passions at the highest level of the state. The clues lead investigators on a number of trails, from the shadows of the French secret service to a manhunt for a possible sex maniac, in a case of murder most foul.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: Willy Pomonti, a retired architect, is found savagely murdered in his opulent villa in La Celle-Saint-Cloud, near Paris. It soon becomes clear that the man has been tortured prior to death. At several points during this extraordinary enquiry, police will feel they're holding the culprit... It will take them ten years to finally shed light on this particularly violent crime.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: The lifeless body of Christophe Lejard is found by his son just metres from their home. The man was shot in the head as he was getting into his car to go to work. A veritable execution, which at first glance doesn't square with the profile of the quiet family man. Yet behind the appearances, the investigation gradually reveals all the hate and resentment that revolved around the victim.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: A man walks into a gendarmerie near Saint-Malo to report that his wife has been missing since the previous day. The couple are going through a divorce, but this mother would never have left her seven children alone! An extensive search is undertaken but the woman cannot be found. What has happened to Adeline Piet? The investigation spans several years and experiences many twists.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: The corpse of Priscillia Ciatti, 14, is discovered by the side of a field, a few hundred metres from her family home. The teenager has been stabbed sixty times with a knife and -an extra sordid detail - a devil mask is found next to her body. Was Priscillia the victim of a prowler? A serial killer? A maniac inspired by a horror movie? Investigators soon find that the young girl felt she was being watched, and even threatened...

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: In the early hours of the morning, Mathilde Croguennec, 18, attending "Teknival" in Brittany, is found at the foot of a tree with her throat cut. Investigators face the task of finding the killer from among the 43,000 participants of this huge open-air festival of electronic music, where drink and drugs are consumed in abundance. An unusual investigation that leads the police down a number of false avenues.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: Arriving at her work, the secretary of a small firm in the suburbs of Geneva finds the body of Jean-Raymond Blatti, the company's new accountant. The man is lying in a pool of blood and, on his belly, the murderer has written "DIRTY RAPIST". Yet Jean-Raymond Blatti was never charged with sexual assault. Over the course of the investigation, this inscription will appear as one of the many mysteries of this case which is particularly rich in twists and turns.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: On July 19th 2004, the naked and tied up body of a woman is recovered in the Ourcq canal in Fresnes-sur-Marne. The victim is impossible to identify.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: On April 3th 2003, Chantal Ternik, a 48 year old housewife, is discovered hanged in her house of Sanary-sur-Mer, in Var.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: On March 28th 2013, the burnt body of Anne Barbot, 38 years old, is discovered in a forest of Maine-et-Loire.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: On May 17th 2005, a body is discovered in a forest of Sucy-en-Brie; Christophe Belle, 40 years old, a renowned pastry cook.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: The disturbing missing case in Paris of a four year old.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: On October 13th 1996, the body of young Angélique Dumetz, 18 years old, is recovered down a ditch in Oise forest. An important clue is found on the crime scene.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: A Night of Horror at Devil's Plateau (Marie-Jeanne Meyer Case) - On June 18, 2011, Marie-Jeanne Meyer, 17-years old, waved goodbye to her little sister before leaving for her daily jog on the heights of Tournon in Ardèche. She never came back. Three days later, her mutilated body was found in a freshly dug pit, near an area known to be cursed, "The Devil's Plateau." What's more, the crime scene looked like a mystical ritual ... Was it a ritual murder? Revenge? An unfortunate encounter? ...

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: A Mysterious Murder at the Farm (Valérie Bary Case)- On Friday, March 26, 2004, in the region of Dijon, Laurent Bary came home from his work to discover the lifeless body of his wife, Valerie, bathing in a pool of blood. According to the investigators' initial findings, the 38-year-old nurse's aid had been stabbed several times, seeming to validate the theory of a robbery gone wrong.

programme.desc: On July 13, 2011, two boaters retrieved a suitcase that was floating in the bay of Lorient. Inside, they discovered the tied up corpse of a man.

programme.desc: Beat creates a cozy cabin in Germany, while Peter and Sr. win a Guinness World Record with a log car.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Bryan Jr. feels the heat to recreate the cozy log home a British Columbia couple lost to a fire.

programme.title: Timber Kings

programme.desc: Beat and André are lassoed into building an elaborate carved archway for the Williams Lake Stampede.

programme.desc: Bryan Sr. and Joel brave the British Columbia backwoods to save a historic game warden's cabin.

programme.title: Timber Kings

programme.title: Timber Kings

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 You Snooze, You Lose
programme.desc: Beth designs a luxurious new office for the team and shows it off to Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Both brother Tim and fellow Honolulu bondsman James need Dog's help.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.sub-title: S05 : E01 Up on the Roof
programme.desc: Today Dog and the family are back in Colorado.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "IDENTITY CRISIS"
programme.desc: It's the first week of April in the upper midwest. Our fisherman are looking for record setting hauls while market is still high.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "THE NEW GENERATION"
programme.desc: Everyone deals with harsh conditions as Mike and his son work a tough Lake Pepin, Jedd and his father can't seem to see eye to eye in Wisconsin and Tim heads out with a first timer only to come up pretty much empty handed.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "WIN SOME,LOSE SOME"
programme.desc: It's the last week of March and a warm spring has upset typical fish patterns and our experienced commercial fishermen are struggling to adjust.

programme.title: Survivorman S3 - "Survivorman & Son Tofino"
programme.desc: Stranded while kayaking in British Columbia, Les Stroud must protect his teenage son from the elements while teaching him vital survival skills.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Leunenberger Air Service"
programme.desc: Host Mikey Metcalf visit Leunenberger Air Service in Northern Ontario, fishing for Northern Pike and White Fish.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Dunlop Lodge"
programme.desc: Alyx Parks & Colin Mckeown are in Algoma Country on the hunt for wild brook and rainbow trout.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Hardcore Hapuka"
programme.desc: We return to Fiordland in the hope of going one step better in slotting a hapuka on a spear, but the presence of Bluefin Tuna off the coast, and Wapiti Bulls on the slip faces proves a tempting distraction from the task at hand!

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Pitt Island Expedition"
programme.desc: Following a ridiculous sequence of events in Fiordland, the team saddle up and head for the hapuka haven of the Chatham Islands, where they spend a few days diving the spectacular & remote Pitt Island.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Southern Bluefin Tuna Epic"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Southern Bluefin Tuna Epic
programme.desc: After hearing reports of massive schools of southern bluefin tuna out of Milford Sound, Tim, Jordy, Kieran, Sam and Dave saddle up and try their luck, but a gear malfunction right in the heat of the moment threatens to seriously burst their bubble.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots S2 - "Hanging by a Thread"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Hanging by a Thread
programme.desc: Tanalian Aviation bush pilots Joel and Josiah earn their keep slinging a stranded snow machine.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots S2 - "Into the Deep"
programme.desc: The bush pilots have to use all their skills - scuba diving, underwater rigging and expert flying - to try and salvage a de Havilland Beaver wing at the bottom of the 6 Mile Lake.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots S2 - "Flying High"
programme.desc: The Tanalian bush pilots transport extreme paragliders to Moose Creek, in the Talkeetna Range, for a once-in-a-lifetime airbone experience.

programme.title: Dropped S3 - "Bull in the Bush"
programme.sub-title: S03 : E09 Bull in the Bush
programme.desc: After over three weeks, Chris and Casey Keefer reach the heart of moose country. Minutes after pitching their tent in a new spot, they come face-to-face with a giant bull.

programme.title: Dropped S3 - "End of the Line"
programme.sub-title: S03 : E10 End of the Line
programme.desc: As the 80-mile river journey nears its end, Chris and Casey Keefer have one last shot at an Alaskan moose before their extraction point.

programme.title: Dropped S4 - "To Be Alive"
programme.desc: Chris and Casey select a duo to join them in Alaska after reviewing video submissions. At the airport, Casey and Kaid embark on their adventure, while Chris and his team face delays at the hangar.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S2 - "Stranded In The Alaska Wild - Part 2"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Stranded In The Alaska Wild - Part 2
programme.desc: After a successful hunt, Adrian Knopps’ hunting partner disappears taking their bear out to the boat. Now Adrian finds himself stranded on a tidal flat surround by bears and wolf packs and with massive storm bearing down on him. How will he survive?

programme.title: Fight to Survive S2 - "The Journal"
programme.desc: Pastor Mike Turner is on a solo hike across the continental divide in the unforgiving Wind Rivers Range of Wyoming, when he becomes hopelessly trapped under a boulder. He chronicles his grueling 11 day fight to survive in his own journal.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S2 - "Tree Stand Fall"
programme.desc: Deer hunter Nathan Holcomb plummets from his tree stand. Every hunters’ worst nightmare becomes Nathan’s reality. With a broken back paralyzing him, Nathan must crawl out on his own to find help.

programme.title: Survival Science S1 - "Sniper Attack"
programme.desc: Military snipers are trained in a variety of skills: detection, stalking, camouflage, infiltration, special reconnaissance and target acquisition. Bottom line, a ton of cool shooting and science for Nick and Laura to explore!

programme.title: Survival Science S1 - "Surviving a Lightning Strike"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Surviving a Lightning Strike
programme.desc: Laura and Nick travel to a state-of-the-art Direct Effects Lightning Test Lab. With some “explosive” experiments, they’ll determine the power lightning and how it behaves? And they’ll find out how can hunters and fishermen best protect themselves?

programme.title: Survivorman S3 - "Survivorman & Son Tofino"
programme.desc: Stranded while kayaking in British Columbia, Les Stroud must protect his teenage son from the elements while teaching him vital survival skills.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Leunenberger Air Service"
programme.desc: Host Mikey Metcalf visit Leunenberger Air Service in Northern Ontario, fishing for Northern Pike and White Fish.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Dunlop Lodge"
programme.desc: Alyx Parks & Colin Mckeown are in Algoma Country on the hunt for wild brook and rainbow trout.

programme.title: Emergency S1 - "National Day"
programme.desc: In Israel, back-to-back Memorial and Independence Days put heavy demands on Magen David Adom. In Belgium, the July 21 national holiday draws over 200,000 people, triggering a surge in medical emergencies.

programme.title: Emergency S1 - "Ibiza"
programme.desc: Ibiza’s medical services face heavy strain during tourist season, often due to late-night excesses. In Thailand, nurses work tirelessly at the Full Moon Party to keep international revelers safe.

programme.title: Emergency S1 - "Carnival"
programme.desc: Rio’s Carnival—a week of samba and celebrations—often sends many to the ER. At Barcelona’s La Mercè Festival, first aid stations care for the injured, sick, and intoxicated.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots S2 - "On Thin Ice"
programme.desc: On a rare day off, Josiah and his friends white water raft where few have gone before - on top of the massive Knik Glacier.

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 - "Foggy Goose Hunts"
programme.desc: Together with her Dad, Stefanie runs DK WAI, a danish hunting store focusing on goose hunting. Join them on an early morning to go regulate the numbers and get the geese off the farmers field, saving his crop.

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 - "Chef Nikolaj in Denmark"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Chef Nikolaj in Denmark
programme.desc: Rock Star, Chef, Hunter, Cookbook author, Father, Fisherman, and the titles go on! Nikolaj transforms his raw materials into simple and delicious dishes.

programme.title: Dropped S4 - "Seperation Anxiety"
programme.desc: Alaskan weather clears for Chris and Kaid to hunt food, while Casey and R.L. set up camp before moose season. It's their first time being Dropped separately, requiring adjustment.

programme.title: Dropped S4 - "Predators Prowl"
programme.desc: Chris and Kaid ready their rafts while Casey and R.L. begin searching for black bears and moose. Chris and Kaid spot a predator heading toward camp.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Bay of Islands Exploration"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Bay of Islands Exploration
programme.desc: The fellas set off to tick a box for rookie spearo Ants, aiming to bag him his first ever kingfish, before shifting focus to landing a few more prized fish in some stunning Bay of Islands blue water, but as it doesn't all go according to plan!

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "South Minerva Reef"
programme.desc: The team embark on their biggest mission to date, an expedition to the remote and revered Minerva Reefs, where they encounter the most incredible diving conditions they've ever experienced, but also, a thriving population of voracious sharks!

programme.title: Wardens S5 - "Above & Beyond"
programme.desc: Wardens often go the extra mile to investigate a report of illegal activity, help a hunter or protect landowner rights. This week Wardens go that extra mile with an unexpected outcome.

programme.title: Wardens S5 - "Thrill Kill"
programme.desc: In 2012 The small community of Whitefish Montana was shocked by the useless killing of over 20 deer. Region 1 Wardens think outside the box to put a stop to this heinous crime.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S2 - "Adrift Pt. 1"
programme.desc: In what is regarded as one of greatest survival stories of the 20th Century, sailor Steven Callahan finds himself alone and adrift in a life raft after his boat, the Napoleon Solo, sinks in the mid Atlantic.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S2 - "Adrift Pt. 2"
programme.desc: Facing starvation, dehydration and predators from the deep, sailor Steven Callahan fights to survive not only the physical hardships, but also the mental and emotional strain of being adrift and alone in a disintegrating life raft.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Leunenberger Air Service"
programme.desc: Host Mikey Metcalf visit Leunenberger Air Service in Northern Ontario, fishing for Northern Pike and White Fish.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Dunlop Lodge"
programme.desc: Alyx Parks & Colin Mckeown are in Algoma Country on the hunt for wild brook and rainbow trout.

programme.title: Madfin Shark Series S1 - "Day Two Pt. 1"
programme.desc: Day two of the Madfin Shark Series begins, as it's becoming clearer which of our four 2-man teams will have to do whatever it takes to not be in last place & being eliminated. Hurricane Hole Marina in Key West sees the sharks finding captains idle.

programme.title: Madfin Shark Series S1 - "Day Two Pt.2"
programme.desc: Day two & the battle continues on the Madfin Shark Series. Four of our 2-man teams are catching & releasing the biggest & most dangerous sharks they can for the most points they can accrue. After today, one team will be sent home & eliminated.

programme.title: Madfin Shark Series S1 - "Day Three Pt. 1"
programme.desc: It's the third and final day of competition for the remaining 3 teams in this intense shark tournament. See how the first half of the day turns out.

programme.title: Madfin Shark Series S1 - "Day Three Pt.2"
programme.desc: Day three continues at Hurricane Hole Marina in Key West, FL. Our three remaining 2-man teams are doing everything they can to find, catch & release the biggest sharks they can for points with only one goal in mind, bring home the trophy & the title.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue S1 - "Episode 1"
programme.desc: Anthony strives to prove himself as medical lead responding to a snowmobile crash on Togwotee Pass.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue S1 - "Episode 2"
programme.desc: The first priority of every mission is team safety, so when conditions on Pyramid Peak threaten Jake and Cody during a rescue, Tim demands they pump the breaks.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue S1 - "Episode 3"
programme.desc: Jake and Marilynn cancel a dinner party so they can respond to an injured skier on Teton Pass.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Bayview Outfitters"
programme.desc: Colin McKeown and friend Howard Sonnenburg are in Newfoundland chasing Atlantic Salmon. It's Howard's first experience with Salmon!

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Regions of Ontario"
programme.desc: Highlighting some of the finest fishing locations in Northern Ontario for multi species.

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 - "The Ducks of Venice"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 The Ducks of Venice
programme.desc: Follow in the footsteps of Hemmingway and visit the son of a famous duck decoy maker, who made all of Hemmingway's decoys, and shared many mornings in the lagoon with the famed American Author.

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 - "Danish Dynamite & The Boar"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Danish Dynamite & The Boar
programme.desc: Mette is a personal trainer in one of Copenhagen's best gyms. She is also a hunter. Challenge the stereotypical "old white men" hunter image, and the paradox of the young female urbanite.

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 - "The Italian Hare"
programme.desc: Travel back to the Apennine Mountains in Italy and join a hare hunt all the way up and above the clouds.

programme.title: Dropped S4 - "Cloudy Days"
programme.desc: On day two of the hunting season, Chris and Kaid explore downstream for a better location and fish. Meanwhile, Casey and R.L. savor salmon for protein. Alaska is pounded by massive storm clouds.

programme.title: Dropped S4 - "Soaked Spirits"
programme.desc: R.L. opens up to Casey about the trials that led him to realize the importance of Be Alive. Chris and Kaid are holed up in the tent at the mercy of the Alaskan weather. Casey and R.L. find some food.

programme.title: Dropped S4 - "Bearing Down"
programme.desc: While enjoying some supper, Casey spots a bear browsing the hillside. He and R.L. make a mad dash in the rain to attempt to get within range. Chris is growing tired of being stuck in the tent.

programme.title: Wardens S5 - "Invasive Species"
programme.desc: Protecting Montana Waters from Aquatic Invasive Species is a top priority for Montana FWP. But when AIS check stations are set up in Region 1 and 3 it's up to the Wardens to educate the public.

programme.title: Wardens S5 - "Axel and Chains"
programme.desc: When Wardens respond to a call sometimes getting there is most of the battle. And we pay tribute to an honorary warden that will truly be missed.

programme.title: Wardens S5 - "Stolen Future"
programme.desc: Montana Game Wardens have their hands full with headless deer, trophy bull elk being poached and illegally tagged deer. But the Future of hunting is bright with a new batch of hunters.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "North Minerva Reef"
programme.desc: After punching their way to North Minerva, the fellas continue their quest to land a big pelagic, but the local toothies threaten to throw a spanner into the team’s plans. Can they bag a tropical trophy, or will the sharks rain on their parade?

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Yellowfin Mission"
programme.desc: Word's gotten out about some massive yellowfin baitballs, so the team head out in search of more tuna glory. Dwane, Kieran, Sam and Dave then bounce over the ditch for a few days diving the stunning waters of the Great Barrier Reef.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Lucinda Sky with Diamonds"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 Lucinda Sky with Diamonds
programme.desc: The lads try their luck at getting a spear into one of the quintessential Australian fish species - the barramundi. Problem is, these 'barra' inhabit the same waters as a couple of other less welcome locals - saltwater crocodiles and bull sharks!

programme.title: Fight to Survive S3 - "Nightmare Canyon - Part 1"
programme.desc: Justin and Jeremy Harris’ weekend decent into a remote Utah canyon becomes a survival nightmare when Justin severely breaks his leg. As night fast approaches and temperatures drop below freezing, how will these two brothers survive?

programme.title: Fight to Survive S3 - "Nightmare Canyon - Part 2"
programme.desc: After Justin Harris severely breaks his leg deep in a remote, Utah canyon, it ‘s up to his brother Jeremy to climb out for help. Clawing his way through icy pools of water and up rock faces, pushes Jeremy to his limit.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S3 - "Under The Desert Sun"
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 Under The Desert Sun
programme.desc: Ed Rosenthal set out for a short hike in Joshua Tree National Park, but in the heat of the day he became turned around and lost. His six-day ordeal of survival in blazing temperatures with no food or water is nothing short of miraculous.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue S1 - "Episode 4"
programme.desc: The team battles high winds in the heli to save a snowmobiler with a busted femur.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Bayview Outfitters"
programme.desc: Colin McKeown and friend Howard Sonnenburg are in Newfoundland chasing Atlantic Salmon. It's Howard's first experience with Salmon!

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Regions of Ontario"
programme.desc: Highlighting some of the finest fishing locations in Northern Ontario for multi species.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "FAMILY TIES"
programme.desc: It's late spring in the upper midwest and our commercial fishermen continue to endure a difficult season. The unpredictable and erratic weather conditions are an opportunity for crews to pull together.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "SUMMER"
programme.desc: This time of year is usually a time for commercial fishermen to think about vacation but due to a poor spring, Mike, Tim, Jedd and their crews are fishing well into summer.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "NEW BEGINNINGS IN AUTUMN"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 NEW BEGINNINGS IN AUTUMN
programme.desc: As the season changes from summer to fall, change is also in store for our commercial fishermen. One man is just starting out, one is barely getting by, and one is looking to start over.

programme.title: Dropped S4 - "High Waters"
programme.desc: Stuck in the tent for days, Chris and Kaid finally get a break in the weather. They realize the rain has flooded the river dangerously. Nonetheless, the hunt for big game persists.

programme.title: Dropped S4 - "Moose Fever"
programme.desc: Chris and Kaid pursue a big bull moose, and Kaid finds himself with hide in his crosshairs. Casey and R.L. continue their search for big game. The high river waters refuse to quit raging.

programme.title: Dropped S4 - "Weary Travelers"
programme.desc: R.L. and Casey venture far from camp to access prime moose territory during the rut. Meanwhile, bad weather prompts Chris to scout a potential new extraction point.

programme.title: Wardens S5 - "Night Chase"
programme.desc: With a massive Winter storm bearing down on Northern Montana Wardens aren't backing off. Wardens catch one guy in a web of lies at a check station while miles away they chase down a decoy shooter that refuses to give up.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Just Another Fijian"
programme.desc: Dwane and Jools are joined by their pint sized proteges this week, as 12-year-olds Eli and Reef tag along on the adventure with the old men on a mission to explore the far flung waters of North Eastern Fiji.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S3 - "Tree Stand Nightmare"
programme.desc: When avid bow hunter, Dr. Joe Baumgardner sets out to do routine maintenance on his tree stands, a twenty two foot fall leaves him with a severely broken leg and miles from help in the deep Mississippi woods.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S3 - "Crushed By A Boulder - Part 1"
programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 Crushed By A Boulder - Part 1
programme.desc: While solo climbing Mt. Goddard, a remote peak in the California Sierra, Gregg Hein’s leg is crushed by a boulder and he’s sent careening down the mountain. Barely able to stop his fall, he’s now faced with a horrific compound fracture.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue S1 - "Episode 5"
programme.desc: Unprecedented three rescues in under twelve hours.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue S1 - "Episode 6"
programme.desc: Jamie puts his trust in new explosives technology.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S16 - "Bahamas"
programme.desc: Mark Melnyk travels to Andros Island to fly fishing at 4 different lodges to experience the ultimate bonefish trip!

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S16 - "Teton Valley Lodge (Idaho)"
programme.desc: Mark Melnyk is in beautiful Yellowstone Teton Territory fly fishing for rainbow trout and cutthroat. He is the guest of Teton Valley Lodge

programme.title: Madfin Shark Series S1 - "Day Three Begins"
programme.desc: Day three ends at Hurricane Hole Marina in Key West, Florida, on the Madfin Shark Series & there can bo only one Madfin Shark Champion.

programme.title: Dropped S4 - "Lifted"
programme.desc: As their Alaska journey nears its end, Kaid and R.L. reflect on life's priorities and lessons learned. Lifelong bonds are cemented as they prepare for extraction.

programme.title: Dropped S5 - "Empty Handed"
programme.desc: The Keefer brothers put boots to ground as their journey through Alaska begins. Armed with nothing but a couple Glock 20s, the brothers immediately begin their search for their first supply-yielding cache.

programme.title: Wardens S5 - "Wasted Dummy"
programme.desc: This week Warden Lesofski searches out a hunting party that left their elk to rot. While Region 2 Wardens rush into a volatile situation after their decoy is shot from the road.

programme.title: Wardens S5 - "Minor Mistakes"
programme.desc: A riverside check station catches four minors with no life jackets and a lot of alcohol. Then Warden Golie stops two car full of minors that should not be behind the wheel.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "WORLDS COLLIDE"
programme.desc: The rough season is starting to wear on commercial fishermen. For some, hard feelings are boiling to the surface and others turn imagination into money.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "FISHING IS NOT FAIR"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 FISHING IS NOT FAIR
programme.desc: The desire and competition for catching fish is at an all time high but fishing is anything but fair.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "STORM IS BREWING"
programme.desc: A distant natural disaster creates uncertainty for all commercial fishing crews in the upper Midwest. Jedd finds a valuable species in his haul but isn’t sure a market exists. Tim races against shifting conditions in hopes of scoring a decent haul.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S3 - "Crushed By A Boulder - Part 2"
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 Crushed By A Boulder - Part 2
programme.desc: After his leg is crushed by a boulder, Gregg Hein is stranded on a high Sierra peak with an infected compound fracture. Knowing he won’t be reported missing for days, Gregg attempts to crawl off the mountain and rescue himself.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S3 - "Iraqi Sniper Attack"
programme.desc: On deployment in Anbar Province, Marine Corp Master Sergeant Buck Doyle throws himself in harm's way to save a fallen comrade from an Iraqi sniper and becomes a target himself. This is a story of survival on and off the battlefield.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S3 - "Lightning Strike"
programme.desc: A bass fishing trip goes horribly wrong when a bolt of lightning strikes their boat, leaving Seventeen-year-old Christian Neal burned and unconscious and his father Gabe blown into the water and paralyzed. It will take a miracle to save them.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue S1 - "Episode 7"
programme.desc: A young snowmobiler's first ride into the backcountry spins out of control.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue S1 - "Episode 8"
programme.desc: Tim demands a lot of everyone around him, especially during a cave rescue - what he describes as "the worst kind of rescue possible".

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S16 - "Waterfalls Lodge (Algoma)"
programme.desc: Jenna McKeown is on the hunt for big smallmouth bass on topwater flies in Northern Ontario. She is in luck as a major dragonfly hatch is about to happen.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S16 - "Flowers River Lodge (Labrador)"
programme.desc: Labrador is renowned for big Brook Trout but also Atlantic Salmon. Host Colin McKeown visits one of the top salmon lodges in the world.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S16 - "Ugly Bug Fly Shop (Wyoming)"
programme.sub-title: S16 : E05 Ugly Bug Fly Shop (Wyoming)
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Survival Science S1 - "Surviving a Mountain Lion Attack"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Surviving a Mountain Lion Attack
programme.desc: Laura and Nick explore the techniques to deal with these apex predators when they are the most dangerous. We’ll scientifically breakdown the behaviors, strength, eyesight and speed of mountain lions through outrageous experiments, in day and night.

programme.title: Survival Science S1 - "LOST!"
programme.desc: Nick and Laura head deep into the mountains to explore survival techniques that go far beyond anything they’ve learned before. Our courageous hosts subject themselves to intense survival training with the Survival Training School of California.

programme.title: Survival Science S1 - "ATV Accidents"
programme.desc: ATVs have allowed us to penetrate the wilderness like never before. But they’ve also made the backcountry a bit more dangerous. Laura and Nick rig up some dramatic, high-speed tests to see how accidents happen and what you can do to protect yourself.

programme.title: Police Patrol S1 - "TOWNSHIP POLICE PATROLS"
programme.desc: Rio de Janeiro’s beaches draw tourists, but beyond the picture postcard imagery lies a harsher reality—favelas ruled by drug gangs. To reclaim these areas, the government deployed BOPE, an elite police force taking the fight to the streets since 2008.

programme.title: Police Patrol S1 - "NARCOTRAFFIC POLICE PATROLS"
programme.desc: As one of the world’s top cocaine producers, Peru is a magnet for global drug cartels. To combat the trade at its source, the elite anti-narcotics unit Sinchi was formed—taking the fight deep into the heart of production zones.

programme.title: Police Patrol S1 - "TOURIST POLICE PATROLS"
programme.desc: With one of the highest homicide rates in the world, Acapulco sees 104 murders per 100,000 people. In this deadly environment, a special anti-crime unit puts their lives on the line daily to keep the city from descending into chaos.

programme.title: Wardens S5 - "True Lies"
programme.desc: A check station outside of Billings stops a guy who refuses to tell the truth. Investigating who shot the deer reveals a long history of game violations.

programme.title: Wardens S5 - "Head Case"
programme.desc: Someone shot and stashed the head of a trophy bull elk. Wardens spend months staking out the head. Once it is moved they use high tech equipment to locate the head and capture the suspect.

programme.title: Wardens S5 - "Blood Trail"
programme.desc: Wardens step into the world of CSI this week in determining where a deer was killed. But when uncovering the truth the best thing is to follow the Blood Trail.

programme.title: Dropped S5 - "Long Days, Cold Nights"
programme.sub-title: S05 : E02 Long Days, Cold Nights
programme.desc: The Keefer brothers awaken to a frozen tundra. With over 8 miles to cover and no oars, the brothers are forced to trudge their way through shallow water and barren earth as they head downstream in search of they second cache.

programme.title: Dropped S5 - "Choke Point"
programme.desc: The terrain begins to change as the Keefer brothers are forced to pick their way downstream. The landscape tightens it’s grip and funnels the brothers to a geographic choke point where both predator and prey gather.

programme.title: Dropped S5 - "Bone-Weary"
programme.desc: The Keefer brothers take shelter in a small pine outcropping as a winter storm sets siege to the river. Forced to wait out the arctic blast, the brothers try and retain what little energy they have left.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S3 - "Mountain Lion Attack"
programme.desc: Marine Anne Hjelle was mountain biking when she was ripped off her bike by a mountain lion. Anne fought back even as the big cat shredded her face in its jaws. Surviving the attack was only the beginning of Anne’s incredible fight to survive.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S3 - "Soul Of A Survivor"
programme.sub-title: S03 : E10 Soul Of A Survivor
programme.desc: Craig DeMartino examines the stories of other survivors he’s met across the season. Their survival stories are all different, but Craig discovers that these survivors share more in common than you might think.

programme.title: The Trail S1 - "Into The High Lonesome"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Into The High Lonesome
programme.desc: Modern day Mountain Man Laramy Miller sets out on the trail to experience life in the high lonesome.

programme.title: The Trail S1 - "Camp Otis"
programme.desc: Life at Camp Otis. Laramy finds success fishing and foraging, and spends his time taking care of 7 and doing camp chores.

programme.title: The Trail S1 - "Relocation"
programme.desc: Laramy realizes that game is scarce because of the wolves and he decides to put some distance between himself and the pack. Time to break down camp and move to a new location.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S16 - "Calmwaters Fly Fishing (Ontario)"
programme.desc: Bill Spicer explores the rivers of southern Ontario with several guides to catch brown and rainbow trout.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S16 - "Big Horn Angler Fly Shop (Montana)"
programme.sub-title: S16 : E07 Big Horn Angler Fly Shop (Montana)
programme.desc: Mark Melnyk gets the opportunity to take a drift boat trip down the famed Big Horn River in Montana searching for trout on a fly.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S16 - "Fish Tales Fly Shop (Calgary Alberta)"
programme.sub-title: S16 : E08 Fish Tales Fly Shop (Calgary Alberta)
programme.desc: Jenna McKeown visits Calgary Alberta to fish the Bow River. This is one of the few rivers in the world that runs through a major city yet has excellent fishing.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Three Kings Redemption"
programme.desc: After a break of dawn beach launch off the tip of 90 Mile Beach, the team punch north to the legendary Three Kings Islands, home to dozens of record calibre fish, and in the process, bag a couple of new records for themselves.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "The Rock"
programme.desc: The Spearo team are in the deep South this week, departing Bluff for a couple of days diving the pristine waters of Stewart Island, but will the brief weather window allow them to make the notorious steam all the way to remote Solander Island?

programme.desc: It's a full house at the ALDC and the minis are set to compete.

programme.title: Cheaters
programme.desc: Brenda Richards drives herself crazy with suspicions of her boyfriend cheating. Follow up with Derek.

programme.title: Cheaters
programme.desc: Robert Perry discovers his model girlfriend poses nude for another man. Follow up with Jessica Sanders.

programme.title: Cheaters
programme.desc: Rodrigo Coronado discovers his wife working overtime at a specific hotel room.

programme.title: Cheaters
programme.desc: Nicole Mallory discovers her boyfriend's late shift involves another woman.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Josh on kyllästynyt työskentelemään isälleen, joten hän perustaa oman kuorma-autoyrityksensä uudella rekalla.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Armeijan kuorma-auto hajoaa julmalla tiellä kaivokselle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Gary ja poikansa pelastavat vanhan armeijan kuorma-auton, mutta sen ajaminen kaivokselle on raakaa.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Garon ja Josh menettävät Six packin hallinnan mutaisilla teillä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Justin lentää paikalle uuden vaijerisahan kanssa, mutta menettää malttinsa yrittäessään asentaa sitä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehistö kohtaa loputtomasti ongelmia yrittäessään leikata palan 18 metrin pituisesta linssistä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia tuo paikalle ison porauskaluston, ja hänellä on vain neljä päivää aikaa löytää paras jadepaikka, mutta hän ja Robin eivät osaa päättää, mistä etsiä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehet ottavat yhteen, kun he loppukauden kiireet pakottavat heidät työskentelemään kahdessa kaivoksessa yhtä aikaa.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehistö irrottaa jadelohkareita J-linssistä, mutta iso ongelma tiellä uhkaa kaikkea.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kun Claudia ja Robini etsivät jadea poraamalla tuloksetta, edes yhtiön geologit eivät pääse yksimielisyyteen suunnitelmasta.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia, Robin ja miehistö yrittävät saada raskaan kaluston vuorelle ennen kuin tulvivat joet katkaisevat pääsyn kaivosalueelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Ilmassa on jännitettä, kun miehistö yrittää saada raskasta kalustoa mutaiselle, lohkareiden peittämälle 120 kilometrin pituiselle polulle perustaakseen uuden jadekaivoksen vuorenhuipulle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehistö yrittää saada koneensa kulkemaan vyöryvien jokien yli perustaakseen uuden jadekaivoksensa vuorenhuipulle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Alan on vakuuttunut siitä, että Dynastyn alueella veden täyttämän kuopan alla on jadea.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Robin yrittää uhmata fysiikan lakeja saadakseen massiivisen uuden kasarmin Wolverinen alueelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jade Cityn porukkaa koettelee huono onni, ja jokainen keksii ainutlaatuisia ratkaisuja huonon onnen karkottamiseksi.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kaikki innostuvat, kun he vihdoin alkavat kaivaa esiin lupaavia vihreitä lohkareita, joiden miehistö uskoo olevan miljoonien arvoisia.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jännitteet nousevat pintaan, kun ulkomaiset sijoittajat piipahtavat yllättäen tarkistamaan Wolverinen kaivosalueen töitä, ja Alan yrittää rauhoittaa tilannetta.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kun Wolverinen kaivoksella vihdoin löydetään lupaavia lohkareita, miehistö huomaa, että he ovat saattaneet mennä tonttinsa rajojen ulkopuolelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jännitys kasvaa, kun kaivoskauden loppu lähestyy, ja Jade Cityn miehistö haluaa löytää kallisarvoisen lohkareen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jade Cityn kaivostyöläiset yrittävät löytää rikkauksia - tarpeeksi suuren jadelohkareen, joka tekee vaikutuksen sijoittajiin - ennen kauden päättymistä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudian ja Robinin testaamattomat koneet alkavat hajota raa'alla matkalla Wolverinen kaivosalueelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehistö yrittää ylittää tulvivia jokia matkalla kaivokselle koneet mukanaan, mutta Josh jää jälkeen ongelmallisen kaivinkoneen takia.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Josh jää jumiin pitkällä matkalla Wolverinen kaivokselle, kun pultit irtoavat kaivinkoneesta eikä hän voi kutsua apua.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kaivoskausi alkaa, ja vaikka jadea ei näy, rekkaonnettomuus tuo Jade Citylle onnea.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Guysta tulee Wolverinen johtaja, ja uuden työntekijän palkkaaminen uhkaa suistaa hänen tehtävänsä löytää kauden ensimmäinen jadelohkare.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Juuri kun Wolverinen miehistö tehostaa turvallisuusmenetelmiään, uusi työntekijä Jay romahtaa, mikä paljastaa heidän hätävalmiutensa säröt.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Josh käyttää uutta kaivinkonetta, kun taas arvottomien kivien kasa saa Claudian harkitsemaan uutta strategiaa.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Alan tuo Jade Cityyn ostajaryhmän, mikä saa Claudian tiimin paniikkiin ja etsimään kauden ensimmäiset myytävät jadelohkareet.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kun miehistö rämpii mudassa etsiessään miljoonan dollarin arvoista lohkaretta, Josh riskeeraa puolen miljoonan dollarin arvoisen kaluston yrittäessään vetää rekkaansa pois vajoamasta.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Tiimi löytää kauden parhaan jadelohkareen, mutta on vaarassa heikentää sen arvoa, kun he yrittävät leikata kaikki halkeamat pois.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudian poika Justin osoittaa, että hän osaa löytää jadea, kun taas Scrappy Larry, Robin ja Josh kamppailevat hinaamaan rikkinäisen autonsa Wolverinelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Huonot tulokset pakottavat Robinin ja Justinin viimeiseen yritykseen etsiä jadekiviä pelastaakseen kauden, kun taas Scrappy Larry kiirehtii muuntamaan dieselillä toimivan säiliön.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudian hanke majoittaa työryhmä Jade Cityyn vaarantuu, kun saostussäiliö vuotaa juomaveteen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kylmän sään saapuessa aikaisin ja velkojen kasaantuessa miehistö työntää, vetää ja raahaa mammuttimaisen ja mahdollisesti kauden pelastavan lohkareen leirille.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kun vuoden lupaavinta lohkaretta työstetään Wolverinella, Josh ja R2 kolaroivat rekka-autonsa, ja Claudia tiimineen jäävät ymmälleen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kilpailu on käynnissä, jotta Wolverinen leiristä päästään pois ennen kuin kaikki jää lumen alle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia joutuu ajamaan kiviautoa, kun hänen miehistönsä kamppailee kivistä polkua ylös Wolverinen vuorenhuipulla sijaitsevaan leiriin.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: 20 tonnia painavan lohkareen kuljettaminen kaivoksesta lähtevällä petollisella tiellä osoittautuu liian raskaaksi heidän vanhalle kuorma-autolleen Six packille.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: 20 tonnia painavan lohkareen kuljettaminen kaivokselta lähtevällä petollisella tiellä osoittautuu liian raskaaksi heidän vanhalle kuorma-autolleen Six packille.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Elokuun hurjan lumimyrskyn takia Claudian ja Robinin on pakko jäädä 2 Mileen, kun taas Gary ja Garon yrittävät pelastaa tilanteen ajamalla myrskyn läpi ja tuomalla heille tarvikkeita.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Robin tekee vaikean päätöksen rakkaan kaivosautonsa Six packin suhteen toisen kalliiksi tulleen rikkoutumisen jälkeen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Talven lähestyessä Claudia ajaa uupuneen miehistönsä murtumispisteeseen, mikä saa kiihkon leimahtamaan ja pakottaa Claudian viimein hyväksymään tappionsa.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Uusi kaivoskausi on täynnä ikäviä yllätyksiä, mutta epätodennäköinen tapahtuma pelastaa tilanteen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI

programme.desc: Jade Cityn kaivostyöläiset yrittävät löytää rikkauksia - tarpeeksi suuren jadelohkareen, joka tekee vaikutuksen sijoittajiin - ennen kauden päättymistä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudian ja Robinin testaamattomat koneet alkavat hajota raa'alla matkalla Wolverinen kaivosalueelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehistö yrittää ylittää tulvivia jokia matkalla kaivokselle koneet mukanaan, mutta Josh jää jälkeen ongelmallisen kaivinkoneen takia.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Josh jää jumiin pitkällä matkalla Wolverinen kaivokselle, kun pultit irtoavat kaivinkoneesta eikä hän voi kutsua apua.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kaivoskausi alkaa, ja vaikka jadea ei näy, rekkaonnettomuus tuo Jade Citylle onnea.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Guysta tulee Wolverinen johtaja, ja uuden työntekijän palkkaaminen uhkaa suistaa hänen tehtävänsä löytää kauden ensimmäinen jadelohkare.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Juuri kun Wolverinen miehistö tehostaa turvallisuusmenetelmiään, uusi työntekijä Jay romahtaa, mikä paljastaa heidän hätävalmiutensa säröt.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Josh käyttää uutta kaivinkonetta, kun taas arvottomien kivien kasa saa Claudian harkitsemaan uutta strategiaa.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Alan tuo Jade Cityyn ostajaryhmän, mikä saa Claudian tiimin paniikkiin ja etsimään kauden ensimmäiset myytävät jadelohkareet.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kun miehistö rämpii mudassa etsiessään miljoonan dollarin arvoista lohkaretta, Josh riskeeraa puolen miljoonan dollarin arvoisen kaluston yrittäessään vetää rekkaansa pois vajoamasta.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Tiimi löytää kauden parhaan jadelohkareen, mutta on vaarassa heikentää sen arvoa, kun he yrittävät leikata kaikki halkeamat pois.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudian poika Justin osoittaa, että hän osaa löytää jadea, kun taas Scrappy Larry, Robin ja Josh kamppailevat hinaamaan rikkinäisen autonsa Wolverinelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Huonot tulokset pakottavat Robinin ja Justinin viimeiseen yritykseen etsiä jadekiviä pelastaakseen kauden, kun taas Scrappy Larry kiirehtii muuntamaan dieselillä toimivan säiliön.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudian hanke majoittaa työryhmä Jade Cityyn vaarantuu, kun saostussäiliö vuotaa juomaveteen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kylmän sään saapuessa aikaisin ja velkojen kasaantuessa miehistö työntää, vetää ja raahaa mammuttimaisen ja mahdollisesti kauden pelastavan lohkareen leirille.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kun vuoden lupaavinta lohkaretta työstetään Wolverinella, Josh ja R2 kolaroivat rekka-autonsa, ja Claudia tiimineen jäävät ymmälleen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kilpailu on käynnissä, jotta Wolverinen leiristä päästään pois ennen kuin kaikki jää lumen alle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia joutuu ajamaan kiviautoa, kun hänen miehistönsä kamppailee kivistä polkua ylös Wolverinen vuorenhuipulla sijaitsevaan leiriin.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jännitteet nousevat pintaan, kun Claudia, Robin ja miehistö yrittävät saada ihmisiä ja varusteita syrjäiseen leiriinsä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia ja Robin yrittävät tehdä vaikutuksen uusiin liikekumppaneihinsa, mutta ensimmäiset päivät uudella alueellaan Bullion Creekissä ovat turhauttavia.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot David faces a remote Arctic airstrip with sketchy landing gear. Mikey drafts a Buffalo hockey team to face off against an NHL squad in a charity shootout. Chuck gets a chance to shine on the ice.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A cold snap triggers massive challenges. Devan runs into gear problems while he ferries a mothballed DC-3 across the country. And Justin has to make a snap decision with his newborn son aboard his plane.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: The Electra returns from repairs and the crew takes it right back to the ice strip that it set off from before the crash landing last year. Tyler works up the courage to confront Joe about a big decision. A hotshot Australian pilot tries to earn a job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Facing Joe's wrath, Rod and Cory head to the UK to make urgent water bomber repairs. David tries to prove himself to Devan in the C-46 but ends up infuriating Devan. Will makes an ultimatum in Hay River.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mikey trains for High Arctic survival with the Canadian Rangers. The Air Force invades Chuck's hangar. Joe faces tough competition at a California plane auction.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Cory, Chuck and Brian watch as a 5,000-pound power unit smash to the ground, denting the Electra and putting it out of commission. Mikey scrambles to manage the crisis while Joe races to England to try and purchase a backup Electra.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Co-pilot Graeme's fumbles his Electra training landings. Chris stresses over his C-46 check ride. Adam rescues a stranded C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey head to England to bring home a new plane. Devan does target-practice in the DC-4.James builds a Buffalo-style soapbox racer.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Joe flies with the Snowbirds during the Hamilton air show and later teaches Mikey to fly. A surprise departure shakes up Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: An engine fire and series of mechanical gremlins has Buffalo scrambling to make its Christmas deliveries. Newest rampie Prefkar Mony struggles with life in the North.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Buffalo's Electra aircraft is hammered by rough winds up the Mackenzie Valley. In Hay River, a rookie crew faces the worst ice storm in years and one rampie has a tough go trying to fit in at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Engine trouble plagues Buffalo's newest Electra, ZFE, and a standoff between Joe and Transport Canada threatens to close the airline. At the same time, Joe faces a tough decision about his old dog Sophie.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Rookie pilot Jeff nearly runs off the runway. Prefkar learns to play hockey but drops the ball at Buffalo and Joe goes on a date with a real dog.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mikey decides to get Buffalo involved in a D-Day paratrooper jump to commemorate the 70th anniversary of D-Day.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Buffalo's top guns, rookies and vets, go to California for aerial dogfights in real fighter planes. Cory and Mikey race to get ready for the D-Day jump.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mikey's much-planned D-Day tribute parachute jump with 20 paratroopers hits a wall when Joe refuses to fly his DC-3 to the drop zone.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Christmas is just around the corner, but Buffalo's crucial food and mail runs come to a halt.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A string of bad luck turns chief pilot Arnie's 66th birthday run into the flight from hell - and threatens to spoil his naughty birthday surprise.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mechanic Cory races against the clock to turn two short-haul waterbombers into transatlantic aircraft for the epic journey to Turkey.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mechanic Cory races against the clock to turn two short-haul waterbombers into transatlantic aircraft for the epic journey to Turkey.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A furious Joe fights against a federal suspension that will prevent him from carrying passengers for the first time in 20 years.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: AJ and Candace get married in the Ice Castle. A frustrated Chuck tries to get the Electra to pay her way. A flummoxed Mikey tries to bake a cake for Joe's birthday.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: C-46 and DC-4 crews race against the spring melt to fly mining equipment to an airstrip on a frozen lake.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: After thousands of hours of painstaking preparation and dangerous flying, a terrible accident devastates the waterbomber crew in Turkey - and everyone at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey head off to Coventry, England to navigate the potential purchase of an Electra turboprop to add to Buffalo's fleet of fire-fighting tanker planes.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: After her husband's acrimonious departure from Buffalo, Kelly has a confrontation that decides whether she, too, will quit.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: As Joe fights a Transport Canada claim against the airline, star pilot Justin is tasked with shipping an 8,000lb generator to a remote town.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: When a deadly fire destroys a northern outpost a week before Christmas, Buffalo puts everything aside to come to the rescue.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mikey goes on a treasure hunt to Venezuela for a rare CL-215 waterbomber.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A vital ferry link is down, so Buffalo mounts an all-out campaign to airlift 100,000lbs of essential goods across the Mackenzie River.

programme.desc: Crusty mechanic Chuck leads the scramble to ready the Electra for a disaster relief mission in Haiti, but fate's curveball sends them to the High Arctic instead.

programme.desc: When thunderstorms and a shaking engine threaten a DC-3 charter to Whitehorse, Joe pulls out all the stops to get the passengers to their destination.

programme.desc: Joe hires Duane Hicks to help Buffalo navigate the future and coach Mikey; a DC-3 delivery mission goes awry when blizzard conditions and a broken oil cooler force an emergency landing.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT

programme.desc: Frustrated with her lack of flying and stuck in a rut as a courier driver, Audrey decides her time at Buffalo is over.
