programme.title: Outdoor and Nature EP8
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Kaštela (U masliniku)
programme.desc: In Kaštela, a cluster of seven towns near Split, winemaking runs deep. Among olive groves and vineyards, Mladen Kuzmanić treated us to local flavors—sipa i bob, pancetta, goat cheese, and homemade sausage—perfectly paired with a glass of regional wine.

programme.title: Med Nations 10 Malta
programme.desc: Malta, the fortress of the Mediterranean, rich in courage, culture, and history beyond its size.

programme.title: Med Destinations Lake Bled
programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Whats On Slovenia Alpine to Adriatic
programme.sub-title: Whats On Slovenia Alpine to Adriatic
programme.desc: Slovenia’s event calendar blends folklore, heritage, and contemporary culture, from the playful traditions of Carnival in Cerknica to the Saltworks Festival, celebrating coastal history and local identity. Modern creativity comes to the fore at LUV Fest, reflecting the country’s evolving cultural expression within the Mediterranean and Adriatic region.

programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.sub-title: Elain Dutton: Agents of Change Panel

programme.desc: For four years, a dedicated team of filmmakers, scientists, and experts explored the Mediterraneo, capturing breathtaking moments where nature and humanity collide. programme.title: Malini Angelica Casablanca
programme.desc: A lot of people say Casablanca isn’t worth visiting and that you should head straight to Marrakesh or Fez — but Malini Angelica completely disagrees! In this video, she explores Morocco’s most authentic city and discovers where Europe meets Africa in a fascinating blend of culture, history, and architecture. It’s not overrun with tourists, it’s 100% real, and it ended up being her favorite city in Morocco!

programme.title: The Great Greek Myths
programme.sub-title: S01:E09 Greek Myths: Dedalus and Icarus - A Shattered Dream
programme.desc: The tale of Daedalus and Icarus: A Shattered Dream follows a brilliant inventor and his son as they attempt to escape captivity with wings crafted from feathers and wax. Fueled by ambition, their flight reaches daring heights—but the dream is fragile. What follows is a powerful lesson on hubris, freedom, and the fine line between aspiration and downfall. A myth etched in the skies of human longing and loss.

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Fabio Luisi e Alexander Gadjiev Torino 2022
programme.sub-title: Concerto - OSN Fabio Luisi e Alexander Gadjiev Torino 2022
programme.desc: On April 28, 2022, esteemed conductor Fabio Luisi and acclaimed pianist Alexander Gadjiev took the stage at the Auditorium Rai "Arturo Toscanini" in Turin, accompanied by the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai. Gadjiev delivered a masterful performance of Chopin’s Piano Concerto No. 2, while Luisi led a captivating interpretation of Strauss’ "Aus Italien".

The programme includes Shostakovich's Violin Concerto No. 1, showcasing Lamsma's technical brilliance and emotional depth, and Franck's Symphony in D minor, celebrated for its rich harmonies and cyclical structure. The performance highlights a powerful blend of passion and precision.

programme.desc: At a time when horses and carriages characterized traffic, visionaries like Henry Ford were working on the mobility of tomorrow. His ideas and approaches have a major share of the individual mobilization in the world.

programme.title: Car History

programme.title: Car History

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: DeVine takes on the wings of death in the first-ever "Hot Ones" Fourth of July special. Along the way, he channels Macho Man Randy Savage, discusses his hilarious "Pitch Perfect" audition and explains why his dad hung up on Joe Biden.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: In between "America's Next Top Model" anecdotes and expert breakdowns of the modeling industry, Ty Ty drops a fire rap verse, critiques Sean Evans' head shots, stress-eats ice cream, strikes hot sauce-inspired poses and so much more.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Cole Bennett is a music video director, an entrepreneur and the man behind the Lyrical Lemonade media empire.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Brie Larson is the box office-shattering star you know from films like Room, Captain Marvel and more.

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Noel Gallagher is a rock 'n' roll legend from Oasis, currently with Noel Gallagher's High Flying Birds.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Ace Man looks back on his storied career and battles his way through the wings of death. Along the way, the rant king gets going on everything from Kanye West to iced tea to the brilliance of crows.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Ronda Rousey is a former bantamweight champion and the first woman to be inducted in the UFC Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Malcolm Gladwell is the author of five NYT bestsellers, including 'The Tipping Point,' 'Blink' and 'Outliers.'

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Davidson offers behind-the-scenes "SNL" stories, talks about walking in an Alexander Wang fashion show and gives a ringing endorsement for "Uncut Gems" and Adam Sandler's basketball skills.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: James Corden is the Emmy-winning host of "The Late Late Show with James Corden."

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Accurately dubbing "Hot Ones" a "cross between Charlie Rose and f*%king Jackass," the comedian Ricky Gervais gets pummeled by the Zombie Apocalypse and Da Bomb Beyond Insanity.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Paul Dano is an actor you know from his acclaimed performances in films like "The Batman," "Little Miss Sunshine," "There Will Be Blood" and many more.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Queen of comedy Leslie Mann takes on the wings death and calls out Hot Ones creator Chris Schonberger.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Half-Cajun, half-Jewish star Shia LaBeouf battles the brand new "Hot Ones" lineup and discusses everything from wrestling with Tom Hardy to giving Kanye West his "Indiana Jones" hat.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Sean Evans doesn't mess around when "the best channel on YouTube" stops by to experience the wings of death.

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Paris discusses bottle service scams, paparazzi evasion tactics, her relationship with the media and the art of 'sliving' (slaying + living) as she takes on the wings of death.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Action Bronson is a rapper, chef and NYT best-selling author - and is in the hot seat for a round two.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Lenny Kravitz is a four-time Grammy Award-winning singer-songwriter and one of the seminal rock artists of his generation, selling more than 40 million records worldwide over the course of his storied music career.

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Tom Holland began his career at 12 years old and he's now one of Hollywood's biggest box office draws.

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Watch Tom Segura reunite with Sean Evans over a brand new hot sauce lineup, discussing everything from Dave Chappelle's surprise special to his beef with pro wrestling and love for Missy Elliott.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Cate Blanchett is one of the most decorated and accomplished actors of our generation with multiple Golden Globes and Academy Awards as well as a resume that includes more than 70 films and 20 theatre productions.

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Adrian Simpson road tests Vauxhall's new Vectra. He finds it very dull to look at inside and out. The 2.2 litre petrol engine feels slow. On the plus side it's better than the model it replaces.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell poses the question, "What's the best GT car you can buy for £90,000?" He tests the top contenders which both come from Stuttgart - the Mercedes SL55 AMG and the Porsche 911 Turbo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason & Tiff pit the new Ford Focus RS against Mitsubishi Evo X. Audi's new Lamborghini engined supercar, the R8 V10, is under scrutiny. Tom Ford examines the brand new Citroen C3 Picasso from the point of view of a truly 21st Century family man.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell tests the new MGTF. He finds it a better road car than the old MGL but it's still not a track day car. Quentin Willson reveals some ways people try to get off their speeding tickets.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason pits two almost identical Porsche Caymans. Jonny is enjoying some Spanish sun in the brand new Audi A5 cabriolet. Tim investigates the accuracy of the combined economy cycle. Jason helps Matthew Pinsent find his perfect car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson tests the latest BMW X5 4.8i. It's an impressive machine - costing £50,000 it'll do 150mph. Jason Palto tests the ultimate track car, the brand new Lotus 2 Eleven.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Fifth Gear Tom Ford is testing the opulent £225,000 Bentley Azure with some help from film director Michael Winner; Jonny Smith tries to drive coast to coast using chip fat as fuel.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson makes an unprecedented attempt to hit 200mph in an A1 Grand Prix car. Tom Ford and Jonny Smith take the seven newest hot hatches on sale and decide which is best.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki takes the Focus RS and the Escort Cosworth to find out once and for all which handles best around a track. Jason drives the Grand Tourer and delivers his verdict whether the £78,000 asking price would represent money well spent.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff and Jason head for the racetrack in the KTM X-Bow and Lotus 2-Eleven. Jonny investigates the smarter and apparently plusher qualities to be found in the latest Golf. Tom conducts a shocking crash test which is essential viewing for all families.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford flies out on Alan Sugar's private jet to test the brand new Audi TT, Vicki Butler-Henderson attempts a new land speed record, and Tiff Needell enters the inaugural D1GB drifting competition.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki finds out what's quickest in the Shoot-Out feature - the brand new Audi S5 or the BMW 335i; England rugby star Kyran Bracken is given some circuit driving tuition from Jason Plato; Jonny Smith tests a potential revolution in city transport

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell takes two coupes onto the Fifth Gear track - the Mazda RX8 and Nissan 350Z. Vicki Butler-Henderson spends a day with Formula One star Lewis Hamilton. Tom Ford is the lucky man behind the wheel of the facelifted Mercedes SL63 AMG.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In a superb world first, Tiff Needell gets to drive a Williams Formula 1 Grand Prix car. With exclusive access to the team we're allowed to follow Tiff every step of the way.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato drives the very special Subaru Litchfield Type 25. Tiff Needell drives the Ferrari 599 1,000 miles on the most treacherous roads in the world.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki is at the controls in a classic Ford v Vauxhall battle, two boy racer specials, the Fiesta ST and Corsa SRi, wage war to find out which is fastest. Tom journeys to the Arctic Circle to test the Volvo XC70, an estate car with four wheel drive.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom tests the chic rival to the MINI the Fiat 500; we find out if fuel additives really work by testing four leading brands; Jonny and Tom build and test an armoured Rolls-Royce with live ammunition and Tiff drives the Ferrari 430 Scuderia.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson finds out if the new Fiat Panda 100HP is as quick as a Ferrari round a track, Jason Plato tries to crack 200mph on the public road in the £230,000 Brabus Rocket.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Fifth Gear gets unprecedented access behind the scenes of the multi-million pound Renault Formula 1 team, and the unique competition they recently held to find an engineer of the future.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason and Tiff take part in another famous Fifth Gear dogfight on Quad Bikes. Jonny attends an auction of DVLA number plates. Vicki tests the Alfa Romeo Mito the new supermini that could finally wipe the smile off the faces of legions of Mini owners

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Quentin Willson, Tiff Needell, Vicki Butler-Henderson and Adrian Simpson visit the British International Motorshow. They look at some of the cars they didn't see at the recent Paris show.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Fifth Gear Jason Plato drives the awesome 500bhp Ford Shelby GT500; Vicki Butler-Henderson races the ultra-exclusive MINI GP against a 90mph radio controlled car; Tom Ford tests the Skoda Roomster.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato test drives the sexiest car of the moment, the Aston Martin V8 Vantage Roadster, whilst Jonny Smith tests the hire car that James Bond drove in Casino Royale, the new Ford Mondeo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason and Tiff try to master the controls of the Red Dragon, a 1700 hp Monster Truck. Jonny drives the new Renault Megane. Tom tests BMW's premium luxury car, the 7 Series. Tom Cave - a 17 year old Welsh rally sensation challenges Vicki.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason tests a brand new model from British track-car specialists Westfield. Tiff has rounded up the newest American muscle cars. Guest presenter Robert Llewellyn heads to Portugal to test a revolutionary electric car from Nissan.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell and Jason Plato race two of the fastest off-roaders currently on sale, the Audi Q7 V12 and the Porsche Cayenne Turbo. Jonny Smith tests the brand new Lotus Evora S. Vicki Butler-Henderson drives Jaguar's most luxurious car - the XJ.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Tiff Needell pit three petrolhead icons against brand new, mainstream cars to find out if the classics we lust after are now outclassed by modern machines.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki and Jason take a day trip to France in the Ferrari 812 Superfast and Aston Martin DBS Superleggera. And, Jonny is at the Frankfurt Motor Show.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Fifth Gear presenter Jonny Smith is granted access-all-areas to Kia's top secret test facility in the Californian desert where he investigates the lengths manufacturers go to in the quest for ever greater reliability.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason rips through Italy in the brand-new Gallardo Superleggera. Vicki gets under the skin of the new Nissan Cube. Jonny examines Volvo's S80 DRIVe with the help of a yacht. Tiff and Jason do battle in the R8 Spyder and Porsche 911 Turbo Cabriolet.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson is joined by Norwegian rally prodigy Andreas Mikkelsen for a high octane motoring triathlon - race in a 200bhp off road buggy, perform an autotest in a Skoda Fabia hot hatch, and battle wheel to wheel in single seat race cars.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Tiff Needell race a pair of high tech supercars, Vicki Butler-Henderson tests BMW's glamorous new convertible in Spain, Jonny gives a beginner's guide to the iconic Nurburgring.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson and Tiff Needell pit what could be the greatest drivers' car of the century - the Toyota GT86 - against its tough rival from Renault Sport. Jonny Smith is in Spain to put Jaguar's brand new F-Type through its paces

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny Smith is at the biggest American car show in the world - which takes place just outside a small town in Sweden. He judges the prestigious best in show competition, goes on a late night cruise and tests the brand new Corvette Grand Sport.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny enters the world of professional drifting as competes in the famous Gatebil show in Norway, driving a specially modified BMW M5. To give himself a fighting chance, he first arranges some tuition from the 2011 British Drift Champion Matt Carter.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason pits two almost identical Porsche Caymans. Jonny is enjoying some Spanish sun in the brand new Audi A5 cabriolet. Tim investigates the accuracy of the combined economy cycle. Jason helps Matthew Pinsent find his perfect car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford tests Nissan's new Micra. He finds it well-made and easy-to-drive. Adrian Simpson goes in search haunted cars. He starts by being very sceptical that haunted cars can exist at all.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff drives the Lamborghini Gallardo Superleggera Jonny goes to meet another pioneer of alternative fuels - a cider farmer who uses rotten apples to produce methane that powers his Jaguar and Tom drives the £260,000 Rolls-Royce Drophead Coupe.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki is at the controls in a classic Ford v Vauxhall battle, two boy racer specials, the Fiesta ST and Corsa SRi, wage war to find out which is fastest. Tom journeys to the Arctic Circle to test the Volvo XC70, an estate car with four wheel drive.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford tests the brand new Ford Fiesta. Vicki Butler-Henderson and Tiff Needell challenge each other on two wheels. Jonny shows us three great, affordable cars. Jason Plato takes the Porsche 911 GT2 out on the track.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Multi-millionaire John Caudwell, the boss of a mobile phone company, has a budget of £500,000 to spend on new cars and he's come to Fifth Gear for some advice on what motors to choose.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki takes two Audi TTs to the track for a shoot-out - one has a manual gearbox, the other a semi-automatic - to see which is faster; Jason drives the Bowler Nemesis, a 500 bhp extreme off-roader designed to tackle the world's toughest rallies.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson makes some noise in TVR's new T350, a £40,000 coupe which promises 175mph, and 4 seconds to 60. Plus we find the ultimate bargain car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell tests he BMW M5, by driving from the UK to the famous Pau circuit in the South of France. Tom Ford tests the world's maddest car - the Ariel Atom.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: We pit the Ford Sierra Cosworth and the Mercedes 190E Cosworth against each other. Tim in London investigates the new craze of car share clubs. Tiff drives the brand new Nissan 370Z around what used to be one of the fastest race circuits in Europe.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki tests the Mercedes Vito X or the VW Transporter Sportline on the track to find out which is quickest. Jonny embarks on the 600 mile transcontinental trip in the BMW 635d. Tom drives the ultimate 4x4, the 12 tonne, 10 foot tall Unimog.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato races two estates head to head. Vicki Butler-Henderson pits the new Pro-Ceed against the VW Golf. Jonny Smith picks up an amazing luxury car for £1000 or less. Tiff Needell runs Fifth Gear's most exciting car v bike race to date.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson finds out if an old Daihatsu Charade is the toughest car you can buy; Tom Ford drives the Honda CRV, the SUV that claims to be greener than a MINI Cooper.

programme.title: Fifth Gear

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason takes two sporty convertibles - the Mini Cooper Cabriolet and Mazda MX-5 onto the track for a hair-do busting shootout. Tim Shaw heads to a garage...with no mechanics! Tiff spends some quality time in the brand new Aston Martin V12 Vantage.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford takes puts the Grande Punto Abarth through its hot hatch paces. Tim Shaw finds out if it's possible to save huge amounts of money by servicing your car yourself. Bruno Senna joins the programme as a special guest presenter.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this edition of we're literally taking Fifth Gear to new heights and celebrating the most spectacular challenge petrol-heads have ever invented.

programme.title: Fifth Gear

programme.title: Fifth Gear

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki takes the Focus RS and the Escort Cosworth to find out once and for all which handles best around a track. Jason drives the Grand Tourer and delivers his verdict whether the £78,000 asking price would represent money well spent.

programme.title: Fifth Gear

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson has a mini-moto race against some of the biggest names in bike racing; Tom Ford tests the new Land Rover Freelander on Britain's most remote school run.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff tests this grand tourer's handling through the dramatic scenery of Snowdonia in Wales. Jason Plato tests the brand new £115,000 Aston Martin DB9 Volante, one of the fastest cabriolets on sale today.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell tests a comprehensive selection of the latest hot hatches including the new and long-awaited Ford Focus RS. He rules out the MGZR, the Mini Cooper S and the Renault Clio Cup.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny Smith goes on a rather expensive road trip - in a £250,000 Rolls Royce Phantom. Tom Ford is testing the new Porsche Cayenne Turbo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff indulges in an end of term treat a classic Fifth Gear shootout, featuring some classic hot hatches from the 1980s. Tim investigates the great diesel versus petrol debate. Jonny visits his idea of automotive hell at the Firecracker Banger meet.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford and Jonny Smith enter a demolition derby in two unlikely vehicles, Reliant Robins. Tiff Needell tests the latest Porsche 911, the GT3RS. Vicki Butler-Henderson drives the new Vauxhall VXR8.

programme.desc: In this special episode of the programme we reveal the winners of the Fifth Gear Awards 2006. There will be prizes for Best Small Car, Best Family Car, Best Fast Car and the overall Car of the Year.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Fifth Gear will be testing three of the most economical cars on the market. There's the petrol-powered Daihatsu Charade and the diesel-powered Citroen C2 and the "hybrid" Toyota Prius.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff conducts a crash test to show why everyone should make sure their next car has electronic stability control. Vicki is at a motor show in Monte Carlo, where she reveals the latest Pagani hypercar and test drives the controversial Fisker Karma.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this episode Tiff Needell and Jason Plato take the new Ford Mustang and Chevrolet Camaro on track to find out if the Americans are now producing performance cars us Brits should be taking notice of.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason rips through Italy in the brand-new Gallardo Superleggera. Vicki gets under the skin of the new Nissan Cube. Jonny examines Volvo's S80 DRIVe with the help of a yacht. Tiff and Jason do battle in the R8 Spyder and Porsche 911 Turbo Cabriolet.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny and Vicki review two mighty 4x4's in one of the shows muddiest Dog Fights. Elsewhere, the team hit the road in the all-new Alpine A110 to find out what's changed since the first incarnation hit our streets back in 1961.

programme.title: Fifth Gear

programme.title: Fifth Gear

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson is in Italy testing the most powerful Ferrari ever made, the brand new 730bhp F12berlinetta, to the limit. Tiff and Jason are at the track with the two cheapest hot hatches on sale - the Suzuki Swift and Renault Sport Twingo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear

programme.title: Fifth Gear

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The battle between Yuya and his mom kicks into high gear! Can Yuya avoid being grounded, or will Loco Yoko put the pedal to the metal and throttle her way to victory?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: As Zuzu and Yugo try to unravel the riddle of Yuya's dimensional doubles, their sleuthing is cut short by Sector Security!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Zuzu and Yugo redline their Duel Runner in a high-stakes Turbo Duel with Sector Security! Can they outrun the long arm of the law, or will Security put the brakes on their escape?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: When Yuya and his pals arrive in the Synchro Dimension, Sector Security is waiting for them with open arms… and cuffs! Can Yuya smooth things out before Sylvio and Celina put a wrinkle in his plan?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: It’s a superheroic showdown in the Synchro Dimension pitting Super Gong against his arch-nemesis, Dennis the Destroyer!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S02 : E58 Scream for the Green
programme.desc: Dennis and Gong are in for the ride of their lives when they’re introduced to the turbo-charged world of underground motorcycle dueling!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The battle between Dashin’ Dennis and Sweet Baby Shay hits a speedbump when Sector Security pulls the plug on their Turbo Duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S02 : E60 Showdown in the Slammer
programme.desc: Yuya learns the ins and outs of The Facility the hard way by coming face-to-face with the toughest and most dangerous duelist in the cell block: the Kingpin!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: With his deck on the line, Yuya looks to rock the cell block and KO the Kingpin!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya is determined to do the impossible and escape from The Facility, but when friends become foes his plan to break out, breaks down!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: When Yuya and his pals try to flee The Facility, their big breakout takes a terrible turn when their escape route leads them straight into the security guards!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S02 : E64 Match with the Master
programme.desc: The opening ceremonies of the Friendship Cup kick into overdrive as Yuya squares off against the Master of Faster - Jack Atlas!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 The Take Back, Part 2
programme.desc: Yusei, who got back his Duel Runner and his Deck, continued his Turbo Duel with Trudge. Blister, who is witnessing the Turbo Duel, does not understand why Yusei is so determined to retrieve his "Bonds of Friendship".

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The two-faced Board of Directors of KaibaCorp trap Kaiba inside a virtual reality game! Mokuba recruits Yugi and Joey to free Kaiba from this ultimate game where losing equals death!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The quest for Kaiba continues with a little help from… Mai? But can Yugi and friends adapt to a virtual world where the rules and strategies keep changing every step of the way?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends rescue Kaiba, but they are still stuck in the game! The only exit is past Five-Headed Dragon, but in the difficult duel, Joey, Mokuba, and Mai lose all their life points! Can Yugi and Kaiba, two former opponents, work together and face the biggest enemy of their lives?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E46 Dungeon Dice Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: A new student, Duke Devlin, defeats Joey in a game of Duel Monsters, forcing Joey to become his servant. Duke forces Joey to wear a dog costume and humiliates him in public, forcing Yugi to challenge Duke to a duel. However, this will not be a Duel Monsters duel, but a new game named Dungeon Dice Monsters!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E47 Dungeon Dice Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: In exchange for Joey’s freedom, Yugi agrees to give up Duel Monsters forever if he loses. Unfamiliar with the rules, Yugi gets off to a rough start. His chances do not improve as Duke reveals that he designed Dungeon Dice Monsters with Pegasus’s aid! Can Yugi learn the new complex rules, much less form a strategy, before he is soundly defeated?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E48 Dungeon Dice Monsters, Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi uses his innate gaming skills to turn the tables on Duke, but Duke has one more rule to mention: All creatures take up territory on the grid-like board. With no room to summon any new monsters, Yugi’s position is helpless!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E49 Dungeon Dice Monsters, Part 4
programme.desc: After Duke’s all-powerful Orgoth the Relentless dices Yugi’s entire cadre of monsters into shreds, Yugi only has one turn left before he loses all his heart points! Yugi’s last hope rests in one final dice roll in the thrilling conclusion to Dungeon Dice Monsters!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 The Mystery Duelist, Part 1
programme.desc: An arcane fortune teller steals the Millennium Puzzle, and Yugi must defeat him in a duel to win it back! However, this is no ordinary soothsayer; he’s a familiar and formidable foe from Duelist Kingdom… or is he? Can Yugi beat him all alone without the help of his friends or the spirit inside the Puzzle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 The Mystery Duelist, Part 2
programme.desc: The mysterious menace controlling Bandit Keith shatters the Millennium Puzzle into pieces before setting the dueling arena ablaze! Can Yugi put the Millennium Puzzle back together and save the spirit before the entire room is engulfed in flames?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 The Past Is Present
programme.desc: The origin of Duel Monsters is revealed! Using the magic of the Millennium Necklace, Egyptian historian Ishizu Ishtar shows Kaiba how Duel Monsters was played millenniums ago! The ancient games have resurrected in modern times, along with three almighty beasts of unstoppable devastation – the Egyptian God Monsters!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The spirit of the Millennium Puzzle realizes that his memories of ancient Egypt have faded, but Téa is going to help him uncover the mysteries of his past! However, their search is interrupted by the dancing duelist Johnny Steps and his musical monsters of rock!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: To face the future, Yugi must first look into the past! Yugi learns that he was a powerful Pharaoh who saved the world five thousand years ago, and he must now save the world again! Meanwhile, Kaiba tests the hidden powers of his Egyptian God Card Obelisk the Tormentor against the fury of Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Stalked by the Rare Hunters
programme.desc: Joey is cornered by a group of sinister Rare Hunters who force Joey into a duel where if Joey loses, the Rare Hunters get his precious Red-Eyes B. Dragon! Though Joey pummels his foes with his mighty monster armada, eliminating life points isn’t the only path to victory…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Yugi vs. Rare Hunter, Part 1: Battle City Begins
programme.desc: It’s time to master new rules and monsters; let the Battle City Tournament commence! In the first duel of the tournament, Yugi challenges the Rare Hunter to win back Joey’s Red-Eyes B. Dragon. However, Yugi’s falling into the same trap that led to Joey’s demise!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Yugi vs. Rare Hunter, Part 2: Up Against Exodia
programme.desc: Yugi figures out the Rare Hunter’s strategy to summon the almighty Exodia, but it’s too late to stop him! The Rare Hunter already has four pieces of Exodia in his hand, and the fifth and final piece is on top of his deck! How can Yugi stop the unstoppable Exodia?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 The ESP Duelist, Part 1
programme.desc: The psychic duelist Espa Roba defeats Rex Raptor as easy as a chumpasaurus, and Joey’s next on his hit list! What chance does Joey have when Espa Roba has the telepathic ability to read all the cards in Joey’s hand?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 The ESP Duelist, Part 2
programme.desc: Joey discovers that Espa Roba’s extrasensory perception is a hoax, but he’s not yet free from Espa's mental manipulations! Espa Roba’s Jinzo not only slaughters all of Joey’s monsters, but it grows in power every turn! Joey’s luck has come to an end… or has it?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 The Master of Magicians, Part 1
programme.desc: The magician duelist Arkana transports Yugi to the world’s most lethal dueling arena where the loser gets sent to the Shadow Realm! Yugi must win this duel or he'll lose much more than his Dark Magician!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 The Master of Magicians, Part 2
programme.desc: It’s Dark Magician versus Dark Magician! However, while Yugi only controls one Dark Magician, Arkana has three residing in his deck! Though outnumbered, Yugi will never give up, as long as he believes in the heart of the cards!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 The Master of Magicians, Part 3
programme.desc: To counter Arkana’s Dark Magician, Yugi pulls a rabbit out of his hat: Dark Magician Girl! It’s the battle of the sexes to determine the true master of magicians!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E14 Playing With a Parasite, Part 1
programme.desc: The trickster Weevil Underwood spins a web of lies to bait Joey into a lopsided duel! Weevil secretly infests Joey’s deck with a parasite that prevents Joey from summoning strong monsters! Without the support of his most powerful beasts, what chance does Joey have against a monster that even Yugi didn’t dare face at Duelist Kingdom: Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth!?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E15 Playing With a Parasite, Part 2
programme.desc: Joey swats Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth only to have Weevil let loose the ferocious Insect Queen, the crown jewel of insects that grows in strength for every creepy crawler it cannibalizes! Will Weevil’s royal ravager swarm Joey into submission?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi faces off against another of Marik’s nefarious Rare Hunters – the silent but deadly Strings! Strings stops all of Yugi’s attacks with Revival Jam, a slippery slime that resurrects whenever it’s destroyed! How can Yugi win if he can’t even put a dent in Strings’s life points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S02 : E65 Traits of a Traitor
programme.desc: With the Friendship Cup about to kick off, Yuya learns about tournament champion Jack’s rise to the Tops!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The first duel of the Friendship Cup has the green light as Crow and Gong put the pedal to the metal!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: For Shinji to inspire the Commons to stand up to the Topsiders, he must first take down Moon Shadow! Can Shinji’s monsters swarm together and deliver the sting of defeat, or will Moon Shadow’s ninjas silence all the buzz?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Sylvio finally takes center stage at the Friendship Cup, but will he crash and burn under the spotlight?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: An escapee from the underground brings word to Yuya on how to take control of the Friendship Cup!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Shay’s duel with Dennis turns into a battle of wits when he tries to force Dennis to reveal his dark secret

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: After finding out that Dennis is from the Fusion Dimension, Shay sets his sights on getting revenge!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Zuzu goes deck-to-deck against Sergey – an ex-con who’s looking to “X” out the competition!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Zuzu goes deck-to-deck against Sergey – an ex-con who’s looking to “X” out the competition!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Shinji’s Battlewasps are stinging Yuya to submission! But does Yuya have one last card that will tip the scales in his favor?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S02 : E80 Where the Truth Lies
programme.desc: Yuya’s newest ally is… Roget? Questions are raised that plunge Yuya's reputation into a freefall!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Crow and Shay soar down the track in a high-flying battle where the loser will crash land into the underground!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S02 : E82 Warriors of the Air
programme.desc: Shay and Crow's winged warriors fight, claw and flap towards the finale…until an unexpected guest decides to join their duel!

programme.sub-title: S02 : E84 A Plan and a Promise - Part 1

programme.desc: Yugo’s in for a bumpy ride as he’s forced to zigzag his way across a duel track that’s been mapped for mayhem by Roget!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V

programme.desc: Yuya’s battle with Crow takes a turn for the worse when Roget takes control of Yuya’s mind!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Obelisk Force has invaded New Domino City to capture Zuzu and Celina! Can Yuya and his friends stop this unstoppable force?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V

programme.desc: Barrett has returned to snatch Celina back to Duel Academy – unless the Lancers can stop him!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Barrett has chained up Yuya and his monsters! Can Yuya break his shackles before Barrett breaks away with Celina?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya’s battle with Barrett comes to a shocking conclusion when a mind-controlled madman drops into their duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Can Jack Atlas best Sergey, when Sergey combines the best of man and machine?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Strings summons one of the most powerful creatures in the history of Duel Monsters... the Egyptian God Monster Slifer the Sky Dragon! What chance does Yugi’s band of mortal monsters have against an Egyptian God?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The spell Infinite Cards allows Strings to hold an unlimited number of cards in his hand, so Strings’s Slifer the Sky Dragon can grow to infinite attack power! Can Yugi discover Slifer’s one fatal flaw before he’s annihilated by tens of thousands of attack points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the sea duelist Mako Tsunami and his bevy of underwater beasts! If Joey wins, he’ll have all six Locator Cards necessary to enter the Battle City Finals, but if he loses, he can kiss the finals goodbye! However, little does Joey realize that he has bigger problems than this duel; the Rare Hunters are closing in on his location…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mako’s oceanic warrior The Legendary Fisherman unleashes a wave of destruction by stealthily destroying Joey’s monsters from the depths of the sea! Joey has to put his skills, training and experience to the ultimate test before he’s all washed out!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E21 Double Duel, Part 1: Yugi and Kaiba Vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Abductions abound! Marik, with the help of Bakura, kidnaps Joey and Téa! To make matters worse, the Rare Hunters also kidnap Mokuba to force Yugi and Kaiba to take on tag team duelists Umbra and Lumis on top of a skyscraper! The losers will be sent plummeting into the Shadow Realm!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E22 Double Duel, Part 2: Yugi and Kaiba Vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba’s tumultuous teamwork! Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they’re sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E23 Double Duel, Part 3: Yugi and Kaiba Vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba start to exhibit signs of teamwork, but it’s too little too late when Umbra and Lumis summon Masked Beast Des Gardius, a monstrous menace even more powerful than Blue-Eyes White Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E24 Double Duel, Part 4: Yugi and Kaiba Vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Yugi combines his magnetic monsters into the polar powerhouse Valkyrion the Magna Warrior! However, little does Yugi know that Umbra and Lumis have one final mask to turn Yugi’s monsters against him…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba are on a rescue mission to save their friends! But along the way, all their worries and secrets are revealed as they relive the troubles they’ve faced… and will be facing in the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E26 Friends 'Til the End, Part 1
programme.desc: It’s friend vs. friend as Marik mind controls Joey to duel against Yugi! The loser will be dragged into the ocean to sleep with the fishes! Can Yugi break Joey out of his spell, or will Joey break Yugi?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E27 Friends 'Til the End, Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joey decimates Yugi’s life points, Yugi can’t bring himself to attack his dear friend! Yugi summons Joey’s favorite monster Red-Eyes B. Dragon to try to bring Joey back to his senses. Will seeing his favorite card help Joey break Marik’s spell, or is Yugi’s last ditch effort a lost cause?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E28 Friends 'Til the End, Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik’s spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle! When Joey draws the card he needs to decimate Yugi’s life points, what chance does Yugi have, especially on his own?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E29 Friends 'Til the End, Part 4
programme.desc: There’s only one minute left in the duel before the loser is sent plummeting to the depths of the sea! Will these best friends actually send each other to their doom? However, there may be a special savior who just regained her eyesight…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E30 Shadow of a Duel
programme.desc: It’s the battle of the ghouls as Bakura unleashes his army of ghosts against Bonz’s zealous zombies for the right to enter the Battle City Finals! But for whom will the final bell toll when this duel is played in the Shadow Realm…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It’s the game of love as Hollywood heartthrob Jean-Claude Magnum challenges Mai to a duel in order to win her hand in marriage! Will Mai succumb to Jean-Claude’s charm, not to mention his cadre of ninja monsters, or will she send him packing back to Tinseltown?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E32 Let the Finals Begin!
programme.desc: Let the Battle City Finals begin! The eight finalists will have their skill and endurance put to the ultimate test in a dueling arena thousands of feet in the sky! Yugi and friends finally meet the other finalists, but none of them are who they appear to be…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E33 The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura, Part 1
programme.desc: It’s the first duel of the Battle City Finals as Yugi squares off against the evil spirit of the Millennium Ring that's possessing Bakura! Yugi quickly dispatches Bakura’s grotesque ghouls, but Bakura has a sinister strategy straight from the graveyard…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E34 The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura, Part 2
programme.desc: Bakura activates Destiny Board, which will cause Yugi to lose automatically in five turns! If that’s not bad enough, Bakura’s Dark Sanctuary damages Yugi’s life points every time Yugi attacks! Unable to attack and running out of time, Yugi’s trapped!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E35 The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura, Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi’s Slifer the Sky Dragon is about to unleash the final blow to win the duel, but Bakura may not survive the blast from the almighty Egyptian God Monster! Will Yugi attack and advance in the finals, or will he surrender to save Bakura’s life but lose the only chance to protect the world from Marik’s evil?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 A Duel to Remember
programme.desc: Yusei Fudo is left unconscious after his harsh Duel with Trudge. The twins Leo and Luna rescue him. After Yusei regains consciousness, Leo demands a Duel with him. Meanwhile, Trudge waits outside in the hopes of capturing Yusei.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Bloom of the Black Rose
programme.desc: Yusei Fudo decides to enter the Fortune Cup, after Lazar blackmailed him to do so, if he wants to see his friends at Satellite alive. On his way, he meets up with his old friends from the Facility, Bolt Tanner and Yanagi and his new friend, Leo at the Daimon Area. Leo and his friend Dexter went to the Daimon Area in order to challenge the mysterious Black Rose.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Welcome to the Fortune Club
programme.desc: The Fortune Cup has now begun. The first Duel is Luna vs. Greiger. But since Luna doesn't want to participate, Leo disguises himself and Duels in her place.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Battle With the Black Rose
programme.desc: Luna and Dexter try to cheer up Leo after his loss to Greiger. They approach Yusei, who tells him the experience he got from losing should prove useful later on. Leo encourages Yusei to win, just before Akiza passes them. She glares intensely at Yusei as she passes. The other three quickly step out of her way. Leo wonders what her problem is.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.desc: Hunter Pace, under the disguise of Shira, Duels Yusei Fudo in the Fortune Cup, using a Deck he's designed to use against Jack Atlas.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Roget declares himself leader of New Domino City! Can the Lancers overthrow this madman, or will Roget’s Sector Security end any chances they have?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The Friendship Cup finale is finally here! Jack and Yuya square off to see who will become New Domino City’s newest champion!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Jack pushes Yuya to his limits in the Friendship Cup finale! Does Yuya have the dueltaining skills to dethrone the Master of Faster, or will Jack’s rule reign supreme?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: With the City on the edge of their seats, a new champion is about to be crowned! But who will sit in the winner’s circle: Yuya or Jack?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The Friendship Cup may be over, but trouble sure isn’t! Roget is planning to take Zuzu to Duel Academy!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya reaches a new place - Heartland City, the hometown of Yuto and Shay in the Xyz Dimension along with Sylvio and Gong. There they meet Duel Academy soldiers and an independent warrior from that dimension.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E101 Realm of The Cipher Dragon
programme.desc: Gongenzaka and Sawatari fight against the mysterious Kaito, who believes them to be agents of Academia. As he summons his fearsome Galaxy Eyes Cipher Dragon, Yuto notes that something has changed in Kaito.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Kaito begins a merciless assault against Yuya with his powerful Galaxy Eyes deck. With Yuto's spirit on his side, Yuya tries to match Kaito's indomitable spirit with both Odd Eyes Pendulum Dragon and Dark Rebellion Xyz Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E103 Rise of the Resistance
programme.desc: Yuya and the others meet the Xyz Resistance, who discuss how Heartland fell to ruin and Yusho's mysterious connection to them. Elsewhere, in the Fusion Dimension, Yuzu flees Academia soldiers when someone unexpected comes to her rescue.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E104 Rumble in the Rubble
programme.desc: Yusho explains what happened during his disappearance to Yuzu while in the Fusion Dimension. Back in Heartland, Yuya comes across an angry youth with a grudge against his Dueltaining style as Yuto refuses to stand by any longer.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Shun is determined to convince Kaito to rejoin the Resistance despite Kaito's adamant refusal. As the former friends cannot convince each other either way, they decide all they can do is fight against each other.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yusho reveals that three years ago he learned of the Arc Area Project and Academia's machinations, going on a journey to stop Leo's plans. Yuri arrives at the You Show Duel School to stamp out the resistance against Academia.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Allen and Sayaka try to fight Kaito only to end up facing Grace and Gloria Tyler, two of Academia's strongest enforcers. Having no choice but to fight, they face off against the Tyler's Amazoness deck.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: As Sawatari and Gongenzaka both fail to defeat the Tyler sisters, Yuya and Shun arrive to meet their challenge. In the face of their near perfect combo, Yuya must not give into his rage and defeat his powerful foes.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: As Sawatari and Gongenzaka both fail to defeat the Tyler sisters, Yuya and Shun arrive to meet their challenge. In the face of their near perfect combo, Yuya must not give into his rage and defeat his powerful foes.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya and the others try to return to the Resistance base when they are attacked by the Obelisk Force. They try to face the power of the Obelisk Force when Shun becomes gravely injured during the battles.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Academia's enforcer Edo Phoenix challenges Yuya to a rematch. Torn between his allegiance to the Professor and his spirit of Dueltaining, a confused Edo is determined to crush Yuya and the ghost of Yusho that haunts him.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: As their duel goes on, Edo only becomes more conflicted of where his allegiances lie. Seeing Edo suffer, Yuya is determined to remind him how fun dueling can be and begins his greatest Dueltaining performance yet.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Convincing Edo, the Tyler twins, and the rest of the forces in Heartland to join their side, Yuya and the other Lancers prepare to head to the Fusion Dimension to find their friends and restore everyone who has been turned into a card.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya encounters his old foe from the Junior Youth Championship, Kachidoki. Kachidoki continues to use violent tactics and powerful Fusions in his Action Duels as Yuya tries to return a smile to his heart.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E114 All Duel Hands on Deck
programme.desc: Yuya and co board a ship to Duel Academy when Dennis catches up to them, aiming to defeat Yusho once and for all. A still vengeful Kaito meets Dennis's challenge as the two unleash their greatest monsters.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Serena, who appeared before the Lancers, suddenly betrays them and captures Yuzu while Yuya is forced to fight Captain Solo. Caught between useless cards and Solo's lock deck, things seem hopeless when more allies suddenly arrive.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Serena, who appeared before the Lancers, suddenly betrays them and captures Yuzu while Yuya is forced to fight Captain Solo. Caught between useless cards and Solo's lock deck, things seem hopeless when more allies suddenly arrive.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yugo meets with up the others and agree to work together against Academia. Yugo and Kaito head to the towers where Rin and Ruri are being held captive, only to face the guardians Apollo and Diana.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E117 Grip of the Parasite
programme.desc: The Doctor has brainwashed Ruri and Rin, leading them to fight against Yugo and Kaito. Meanwhile, Reiji recounts how all of Yuya's counterparts as well as all the bracelet girls are part of Leo's ultimate plan: Revival Zero.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E118 Survival Of The Fittest
programme.desc: Yuya and the Lancers finally make it the Academy, but they are captured and thrown into a wild battle royale against the Obelisk Force. However, a mysterious enemy in the royale begins wiping out friend and foe alike.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Allie is looking to make a big splash at the Arc League Championship, but she soon finds herself in over her head! Can Allie's deck of fishy friends turn the tides, or will her mysterious opponent sink her chances of winning?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The wild duelist known as Battle Beast crushes his fellow Academy students and even turns Crow and Tsukikage into cards. Yuya and Gongenzaka arrive to face the challenge of their insane foe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E121 Taming of The BB
programme.desc: Jack appears out of nowhere and joins Yuya in fighting against Battle Beast. Battle Beast's instructor, Sanders, joins in the duel as well to show the power and glory of the Academy to the Lancers.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Battle Beast continues his rampage against friend and foe alike. Sensing nothing but rage and anger in Battle Beast's heart, Yuya is determined to show him how fun dueling can actually be and aims to purge his demons.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Asuka stays behind to fight Yuri while Sora and the others go on ahead. Yuri uses a different deck and fights Asuka, who tries to reach out a helping hand to Yuri. That's when Yuri reveals the real reason why he does what he does.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya comes across Ruri, who is still under the control of the Doctor's parasites. Yuya attempts to fight off Ruri, made harder when Serena joins the fight. Yuto decides to take control and face the two girls.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Return to the Spirit World, Part 1
programme.desc: Due to Rex Goodwin's special permission, a consolation game is to be held. Luna is called to participate. Leo is unable to substitute and Luna reluctantly comes forward. Her opponent, Professor Frank, has a trip to the Duel Monsters Spirit World planned.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Return to the Spirit World, Part 2
programme.desc: Luna engages in her Duel with Professor Frank when she is called by a mysterious voice to protect the Duel Monsters Spirit World Seeing the turmoil evildoers are doing to this land, Luna must take all her courage and skill at hand to defeat Frank's trump card.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Second Round Showdown, Part 1
programme.desc: The first day of the Fortune Cup comes to a close. Before their Duel begins tomorrow, Yusei and Greiger have a friendly talk during the night.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Second Round Showdown, Part 2
programme.desc: Determined to carry out his mission to his hometown, Greiger uses "Flying Fortress SKY FIRE" to run Yusei down. In response, Yusei reads Greiger's strategy and looks for his chance to counterattack.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.desc: The second round of the finals pits Akiza Izinski against Commander Koda. Koda begins his strategy of tormenting Akiza with her record of the past 16 years, in which flashbacks of Akiza's life are shown.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 Duel of the Dragons, Part 1
programme.desc: Yusei Fudo confronts and questions Akiza Izinski on why she calls the Mark of the Dragon a "wretched mark". During the Duel against her, Yusei is filled with various doubts about Akiza.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 Duel of the Dragons, Part 2
programme.desc: The Duel between Yusei Fudo and Akiza Izinski continues. Unconvinced that Akiza truly takes pleasure in bringing pain on others, he tries to reach through to her and get her to admit this and realize that she can think for herself.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E36 Rage of the Egyptian Gods
programme.desc: The origin of the Egyptian God Cards is finally revealed! The mysterious Shadi takes Yugi on a journey back in time to the creation of Duel Monsters… and the dangerous powers it released!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E37 Awakening of Evil, Part 1
programme.desc: In the second duel of the Battle City Finals, Odion, disguised as Marik, befuddles Joey with numerous traps to bring the duel to a stalemate. However, Joey has Giant Trunade, the perfect counter to Odion’s strategy that guarantees Joey victory… or is Joey falling into another trap?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E38 Awakening of Evil, Part 2
programme.desc: Odion’s Embodiments of Apophis run roughshod over Joey’s monsters… and his life points! Can Joey effectively utilize the monsters he won earlier in the tournament, or is he already too flustered to mount a successful counterattack?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E39 Awakening of Evil, Part 3
programme.desc: It’s a feeding frenzy as Odion’s Serket devours Joey’s monsters to morph into greater and powerful stages of evolution! How can Joey defeat Serket when it ingests Joey’s monsters whenever they’re summoned on to the field?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E40 Awakening of Evil, Part 4
programme.desc: Odion uses a phony Egyptian God Card to summon the third Egyptian God Monster The Winged Dragon of Ra and targets it to annihilate the rest of Joey’s life points! However, is Odion able to control the ultimate power of an Egyptian God, or will The Winged Dragon of Ra punish all those unworthy of summoning it?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E41 Mind Game: Mai Vs. Marik, Part 1
programme.desc: The third duel of the Battle City Finals between Mai and Marik is no ordinary duel; it’s a battle in the dreaded Shadow Realm where losing life points equals losing your memories! As Marik’s true sinister self comes to the surface, does Mai stand a chance against this malevolent evil?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E42 Mind Game: Mai Vs. Marik, Part 2
programme.desc: As Mai loses more and more of her memories under Marik’s relentless assault, she loses confidence in her dueling abilities. Will Yugi and friends’ neverending support bring her back to victory, or will her shattered mind be trapped in the Shadow Realm for eternity?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E43 Mind Game: Mai Vs. Marik, Part 3
programme.desc: Mai gains control of Marik’s The Winged Dragon of Ra, but she’s unable to decipher how to unleash its massively powerful abilities! Can Mai solve the mystery of the Egyptian God Card before Marik solves it himself and incinerates Mai with the full fury of The Winged Dragon of Ra?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E44 A Duel With Destiny: Kaiba Vs. Ishizu, Part 1
programme.desc: In the fourth duel of the Battle City Finals, Kaiba’s mystery opponent is… Ishizu! With the power of her Millennium Necklace, Ishizu can see the future, including every card Kaiba is planning to play! Does Kaiba stand a chance against an opponent who knows his moves even before he does?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E45 A Duel With Destiny: Kaiba Vs. Ishizu, Part 2
programme.desc: Ishizu, using the magic of her Millennium Necklace, has already seen the outcome of the duel – she will defeat Kaiba with her trap! How can Kaiba win when it’s already destined that he will lose? It’s time for Kaiba to change the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Marik’s evil grows, Ishizu reveals the secrets of her bloodline: How did Marik transform from a kind child into a power-hungry tyrant out for world domination? Can Yugi save Marik from the edge of darkness, or is he already beyond salvation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E47 Showdown in the Shadows: Marik Vs. Bakura, Part 1
programme.desc: With their previous pact broken, Bakura duels Marik for the right to control the Millennium Rod and the Millennium Ring, and the loser will be trapped inside the Shadow Realm forever! To tip the odds, Bakura gains an unexpected ally in the form of… another Marik?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E48 Showdown in the Shadows: Marik Vs. Bakura, Part 2
programme.desc: Bakura and good Marik summon The Winged Dragon of Ra, ready to blast and banish evil Marik into the Shadow Realm! But The Winged Dragon of Ra has more than one special ability, and evil Marik knows how to use them all!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Kaiba’s blimp speeds towards KaibaCorp Island for the final rounds of the Battle City Tournament, the ship is hijacked by a mysterious boy named Noah and his henchmen – five familiar foes from Yugi and Kaiba’s past who are out for revenge! With the power of cyberspace on Noah’s side, Yugi and friends are trapped inside a new and dangerous Duel Monsters game!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 Isolated in Cyber Space — Part 1"
programme.desc: Noah displays the power of his virtual world by splitting up Yugi’s gang and flinging them into the far reaches of his self-created universe! The first to duel under the all-new Deck Master System is Yugi against Big 1 Gansley’s Deepsea Warrior! Can Yugi master the complex new rules, or will the rules master him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 Isolated in Cyber Space — Part 2
programme.desc: Yugi faces off against Gansley, in the form of "Deepsea Warrior", but struggles with the complexities of the dueling field and the new rules. Tea faces peril from a vicious tribe of cyclopses while Kaiba and Mokuba are brought to a setting similar to their old orphanage.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi faces off against another of Marik’s nefarious Rare Hunters – the silent but deadly Strings! Strings stops all of Yugi’s attacks with Revival Jam, a slippery slime that resurrects whenever it’s destroyed! How can Yugi win if he can’t even put a dent in Strings’s life points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S02 : E65 Traits of a Traitor
programme.desc: With the Friendship Cup about to kick off, Yuya learns about tournament champion Jack’s rise to the Tops!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The first duel of the Friendship Cup has the green light as Crow and Gong put the pedal to the metal!

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark switches places with an attractive movie star who has a low opinion of men.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan must help his own widow regain her love for life.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: An errant angel has been on probation for two centuries because he's always breaking the rules.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A father attempts to have a memorial made to commemorate his son who was killed in Vietnam.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A dying woman was forced to leave a son behind in the Soviet Union during World War II.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Tragedy occurs when a Neo-Nazi disputes the Holocaust with the son of a death camp survivor.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark assist a novelist who's given up. Also, they motivate the man's grandson, who has yet to tap into his literary potential.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A reporter uncovers a secret about the past of a woman who runs a home for unwed mothers.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark persuade a youngster with Down's Syndrome to join the Special Olympics.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark's friend Scotty wants to adopt the boy with Down's Syndrome. A custody battle occurs with the biological parents.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A man whose son died in Vietnam learns that he has an Amerasian grandson.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A man whose son died in Vietnam learns that he has an Amerasian grandson.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Another angel is upset that Jonathan has been assigned to find a mate for his widow.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Bickering couples go on a trip to learn what it was that brought them together.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark work to keep the three couples together.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A 12-year-old genius at college is treated like a social outcast by his less intelligent but more socially adept schoolmates.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman would like to bridge the gap between himself and his son.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark plans to give a recent windfall to a boys' club. But first he must deal with some con artists.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan's assignment at Christmas is to show a disillusioned columnist that there's still good out there.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark pose as priests in order to reopen an abandoned church as a shelter when a major fire breaks out in a neighborhood.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Wally is a hobo and street puppeteer whose caring and goodness have made him an angel without him knowing it.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark visit a halfway house for people who were confined to mental facilities but released because they were deemed no longer a danger to society.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A Vietnam vet is denied government assistance, despite having lost a leg and an arm.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark work as police detectives in a school. Their assignment: to investigate drug selling.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
